kjv: Gen 1:1 א: In the beginning God created
Gen 1:1 ב: the heaven
Gen 1:1 ג: and the earth.
Gen 1:2 א: And the earth was without form, and void;
Gen 1:2 ב: and darkness [was] upon the face of the deep.
Gen 1:2 ג: And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
Gen 1:3 א: And God said,
Gen 1:3 ב: Let there be light:
Gen 1:3 ג: and there was light.
Gen 1:4 א: And God saw the light, that [it was] good:
Gen 1:4 ב: and God divided the light from the darkness.
Gen 1:5 א: And God called the light Day,
Gen 1:5 ב: and the darkness he called Night.
Gen 1:5 ג: And the evening and the morning were the first day.
Gen 1:6 א: And God said,
Gen 1:6 ב: Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters,
Gen 1:6 ג: and let it divide the waters from the waters.
Gen 1:7 א: And God made the firmament,
Gen 1:7 ב: and divided the waters which [were] under the firmament
Gen 1:7 ג: from the waters which [were] above the firmament:
Gen 1:7 ד: and it was so.
Gen 1:8 א: And God called the firmament Heaven.
Gen 1:8 ב: And the evening and the morning were the second day.
Gen 1:9 א: And God said,
Gen 1:9 ב: Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place,
Gen 1:9 ג: and let the dry [land] appear:
Gen 1:9 ד: and it was so.
Gen 1:10 א: And God called the dry [land] Earth;
Gen 1:10 ב: and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas:
Gen 1:10 ג: and God saw that [it was] good.
Gen 1:11 א: And God said,
Gen 1:11 ב: Let the earth bring forth grass,
Gen 1:11 ג: the herb yielding seed,
Gen 1:11 ד: [and] the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind,
Gen 1:11 ה: whose seed [is] in itself, upon the earth:
Gen 1:11 ו: and it was so.
Gen 1:12 א: And the earth brought forth grass,
Gen 1:12 ב: [and] herb yielding seed after his kind,
Gen 1:12 ג: and the tree yielding fruit,
Gen 1:12 ד: whose seed [was] in itself, after his kind:
Gen 1:12 ה: and God saw that [it was] good.
Gen 1:13 א: And the evening and the morning were the third day.
Gen 1:14 א: And God said,
Gen 1:14 ב: Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven
Gen 1:14 ג: to divide the day from the night;
Gen 1:14 ד: and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
Gen 1:15 א: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven
Gen 1:15 ב: to give light upon the earth:
Gen 1:15 ג: and it was so.
Gen 1:16 א: And God made two great lights;
Gen 1:16 ב: the greater light to rule the day,
Gen 1:16 ג: and the lesser light to rule the night:
Gen 1:16 ד: [he made] the stars also.
Gen 1:17 א: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven
Gen 1:17 ב: to give light upon the earth,
Gen 1:18 א: And to rule over the day and over the night,
Gen 1:18 ב: and to divide the light from the darkness:
Gen 1:18 ג: and God saw that [it was] good.
Gen 1:19 א: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.
Gen 1:20 א: And God said,
Gen 1:20 ב: Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life,
Gen 1:20 ג: and fowl [that] may fly above the earth
Gen 1:20 ד: in the open firmament of heaven.
Gen 1:21 א: And God created great whales,
Gen 1:21 ב: and every living creature that moveth,
Gen 1:21 ג: which the waters brought forth abundantly, after their kind,
Gen 1:21 ד: and every winged fowl after his kind:
Gen 1:21 ה: and God saw that [it was] good.
Gen 1:22 א: And God blessed them, saying,
Gen 1:22 ב: Be fruitful, and multiply,
Gen 1:22 ג: and fill the waters in the seas,
Gen 1:22 ד: and let fowl multiply in the earth.
Gen 1:23 א: And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.
Gen 1:24 א: And God said,
Gen 1:24 ב: Let the earth bring forth the living creature after his kind,
Gen 1:24 ג: cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after his kind:
Gen 1:24 ד: and it was so.
Gen 1:25 א: And God made the beast of the earth after his kind,
Gen 1:25 ב: and cattle after their kind,
Gen 1:25 ג: and every thing that creepeth upon the earth after his kind:
Gen 1:25 ד: and God saw that [it was] good.
Gen 1:26 א: And God said,
Gen 1:26 ב: Let us make man in our image, after our likeness:
Gen 1:26 ג: and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea,
Gen 1:26 ד: and over the fowl of the air,
Gen 1:26 ה: and over the cattle,
Gen 1:26 ו: and over all the earth,
Gen 1:26 ז: and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.
Gen 1:27 א: So God created man in his [own] image,
Gen 1:27 ב: in the image of God created he him;
Gen 1:27 ג: male and female created he them.
Gen 1:28 א: And God blessed them,
Gen 1:28 ב: and God said unto them,
Gen 1:28 ג: Be fruitful, and multiply,
Gen 1:28 ד: and replenish the earth,
Gen 1:28 ה: and subdue it:
Gen 1:28 ו: and have dominion over the fish of the sea,
Gen 1:28 ז: and over the fowl of the air,
Gen 1:28 ח: and over every living thing that moveth upon the earth.
Gen 1:29 א: And God said,
Gen 1:29 ב: Behold, I have given you
Gen 1:29 ג: every herb bearing seed,
Gen 1:29 ד: which [is] upon the face of all the earth,
Gen 1:29 ה: and every tree,
Gen 1:29 ו: in the which [is] the fruit of a tree yielding seed;
Gen 1:29 ז: to you it shall be for meat.
Gen 1:30 א: And to every beast of the earth,
Gen 1:30 ב: and to every fowl of the air,
Gen 1:30 ג: and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth,
Gen 1:30 ד: wherein [there is] life,
Gen 1:30 ה: [I have given] every green herb for meat:
Gen 1:30 ו: and it was so.
Gen 1:31 א: And God saw every thing that he had made,
Gen 1:31 ב: and, behold, [it was] very good.
Gen 1:31 ג: And the evening and the morning were the sixth day.
Gen 2:1 א: Thus the heavens and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
Gen 2:2 א: And on the seventh day God ended his work which he had made;
Gen 2:2 ב: and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.
Gen 2:3 א: And God blessed the seventh day,
Gen 2:3 ב: and sanctified it:
Gen 2:3 ג: because that in it he had rested from all his work
Gen 2:3 ד: which God created and made.
Gen 2:4 א: These [are] the generations of the heavens and of the earth when they were created,
Gen 2:4 ב: in the day that the LORD God made the earth and the heavens,
Gen 2:5 א: And every plant of the field before it was in the earth,
Gen 2:5 ב: and every herb of the field before it grew:
Gen 2:5 ג: for the LORD God had not caused it to rain upon the earth,
Gen 2:5 ד: and [there was] not a man to till the ground.
Gen 2:6 א: But there went up a mist from the earth,
Gen 2:6 ב: and watered the whole face of the ground.
Gen 2:7 א: And the LORD God formed man [of] the dust of the ground,
Gen 2:7 ב: and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life;
Gen 2:7 ג: and man became a living soul.
Gen 2:8 א: And the LORD God planted a garden eastward in Eden;
Gen 2:8 ב: and there he put the man whom he had formed.
Gen 2:9 א: And out of the ground made the LORD God to grow
Gen 2:9 ב: every tree that is pleasant to the sight,
Gen 2:9 ג: and good for food;
Gen 2:9 ד: the tree of life also in the midst of the garden,
Gen 2:9 ה: and the tree of knowledge of good and evil.
Gen 2:10 א: And a river went out of Eden
Gen 2:10 ב: to water the garden;
Gen 2:10 ג: and from thence it was parted,
Gen 2:10 ד: and became into four heads.
Gen 2:11 א: The name of the first [is] Pison:
Gen 2:11 ב: that [is] it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah,
Gen 2:11 ג: where [there is] gold;
Gen 2:12 א: And the gold of that land [is] good:
Gen 2:12 ב: there [is] bdellium and the onyx stone.
Gen 2:13 א: And the name of the second river [is] Gihon:
Gen 2:13 ב: the same [is] it that compasseth the whole land of Ethiopia.
Gen 2:14 א: And the name of the third river [is] Hiddekel:

meaning: Hiddekel (he tie a riddle he make swift)
kjgv: [חִדֶקֶל]|[chidekel]|[Hiddekel] (he tie a riddle he make swift)

kjv: Gen 2:14 ב: that [is] it which goeth toward the east of Assyria.
Gen 2:14 ג: And the fourth river [is] Euphrates.
Gen 2:15 א: And the LORD God took the man,
Gen 2:15 ב: and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.
Gen 2:16 א: And the LORD God commanded the man, saying,
Gen 2:16 ב: Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat:
Gen 2:17 א: But of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil,
Gen 2:17 ב: thou shalt not eat of it:
Gen 2:17 ג: for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.
Gen 2:18 א: And the LORD God said,
Gen 2:18 ב: [It is] not good that the man should be alone;
Gen 2:18 ג: I will make him an help meet for him.
Gen 2:19 א: And out of the ground the LORD God formed
Gen 2:19 ב: every beast of the field,
Gen 2:19 ג: and every fowl of the air;
Gen 2:19 ד: and brought [them] unto Adam to see what he would call them:
Gen 2:19 ה: and whatsoever Adam called every living creature,
Gen 2:19 ו: that [was] the name thereof.
Gen 2:20 א: And Adam gave names to all cattle,
Gen 2:20 ב: and to the fowl of the air,
Gen 2:20 ג: and to every beast of the field;
Gen 2:20 ד: but for Adam there was not found an help meet for him.
Gen 2:21 א: And the LORD God caused a deep sleep to fall upon Adam,
Gen 2:21 ב: and he slept: and he took one of his ribs,
Gen 2:21 ג: and closed up the flesh instead thereof;
Gen 2:22 א: And the rib, [...] the LORD God [...] made
Gen 2:22 ב: which [...] had taken from man, [...] he
Gen 2:22 ג: a woman,
Gen 2:22 ד: and brought her unto the man.
Gen 2:23 א: And Adam said, This [is] now bone of my bones,
Gen 2:23 ב: and flesh of my flesh:
Gen 2:23 ג: she shall be called Woman,
Gen 2:23 ד: because she was taken out of Man.
Gen 2:24 א: Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother,
Gen 2:24 ב: and shall cleave unto his wife:
Gen 2:24 ג: and they shall be one flesh.
Gen 2:25 א: And they were both naked,
Gen 2:25 ב: the man and his wife,
Gen 2:25 ג: and were not ashamed.
Gen 3:1 א: Now the serpent was more subtil than any beast of the field
Gen 3:1 ב: which the LORD God had made.
Gen 3:1 ג: And he said unto the woman,
Gen 3:1 ד: Yea, hath God said,
Gen 3:1 ה: Ye shall not eat of every tree of the garden?
Gen 3:2 א: And the woman said unto the serpent,
Gen 3:2 ב: We may eat of the fruit of the trees of the garden:
Gen 3:3 א: But of the fruit of the tree which [is] in the midst of the garden,
Gen 3:3 ב: God hath said,
Gen 3:3 ג: Ye shall not eat of it,
Gen 3:3 ד: neither shall ye touch it,
Gen 3:3 ה: lest ye die.
Gen 3:4 א: And the serpent said unto the woman,
Gen 3:4 ב: Ye shall not surely die:
Gen 3:5 א: For God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof,
Gen 3:5 ב: then your eyes shall be opened,
Gen 3:5 ג: and ye shall be as gods,
Gen 3:5 ד: knowing good and evil.
Gen 3:6 א: And when the woman saw that the tree [was] good for food,
Gen 3:6 ב: and that it [was] pleasant to the eyes,
Gen 3:6 ג: and a tree to be desired to make [one] wise,
Gen 3:6 ד: she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat,
Gen 3:6 ה: and gave also unto her husband with her; and he did eat.
Gen 3:7 א: And the eyes of them both were opened,
Gen 3:7 ב: and they knew that they [were] naked;
Gen 3:7 ג: and they sewed fig leaves together,
Gen 3:7 ד: and made themselves aprons.
Gen 3:8 א: And they heard the voice of the LORD God
Gen 3:8 ב: walking in the garden in the cool of the day:
Gen 3:8 ג: and Adam and his wife hid themselves
Gen 3:8 ד: from the presence of the LORD God
Gen 3:8 ה: amongst the trees of the garden.
Gen 3:9 א: And the LORD God called unto Adam,
Gen 3:9 ב: and said unto him, Where [art] thou?
Gen 3:10 א: And he said, I heard thy voice in the garden,
Gen 3:10 ב: and I was afraid, because I [was] naked;
Gen 3:10 ג: and I hid myself.
Gen 3:11 א: And he said,
Gen 3:11 ב: Who told thee that thou [wast] naked?
Gen 3:11 ג: of the tree, whereof I commanded thee that thou shouldest not eat?
Gen 3:11 ד: Hast thou eaten
Gen 3:12 א: And the man said,
Gen 3:12 ב: The woman whom thou gavest [to be] with me,
Gen 3:12 ג: she gave me of the tree,
Gen 3:12 ד: and I did eat.
Gen 3:13 א: And the LORD God said unto the woman,
Gen 3:13 ב: What [is] this [that] thou hast done?
Gen 3:13 ג: And the woman said,
Gen 3:13 ד: The serpent beguiled me,
Gen 3:13 ה: and I did eat.
Gen 3:14 א: And the LORD God said unto the serpent,
Gen 3:14 ב: Because thou hast done this,
Gen 3:14 ג: thou [art] cursed above all cattle,
Gen 3:14 ד: and above every beast of the field;
Gen 3:14 ה: upon thy belly shalt thou go,
Gen 3:14 ו: and dust shalt thou eat all the days of thy life:
Gen 3:15 א: And I will put enmity between thee and the woman,
Gen 3:15 ב: and between thy seed and her seed;
Gen 3:15 ג: it shall bruise thy head,
Gen 3:15 ד: and thou shalt bruise his heel.
Gen 3:16 א: Unto the woman he said,
Gen 3:16 ב: I will greatly multiply thy sorrow
Gen 3:16 ג: and thy conception; in sorrow thou shalt bring forth children;
Gen 3:16 ד: and thy desire [shall be] to thy husband,
Gen 3:16 ה: and he shall rule over thee.
Gen 3:17 א: And unto Adam he said,
Gen 3:17 ב: Because thou hast hearkened unto the voice of thy wife,
Gen 3:17 ג: and hast eaten of the tree, of which I commanded thee, saying,
Gen 3:17 ד: Thou shalt not eat of it:
Gen 3:17 ה: cursed [is] the ground for thy sake;
Gen 3:17 ו: in sorrow shalt thou eat [of] it all the days of thy life;
Gen 3:18 א: Thorns also and thistles shall it bring forth to thee;
Gen 3:18 ב: and thou shalt eat the herb of the field;
Gen 3:19 א: In the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground;
Gen 3:19 ב: for out of it wast thou taken:
Gen 3:19 ג: for dust thou [art],
Gen 3:19 ד: and unto dust shalt thou return.
Gen 3:20 א: And Adam called his wife’s name Eve;
Gen 3:20 ב: because she was the mother of all living.
Gen 3:21 א: Unto Adam also and to his wife did the LORD God make
Gen 3:21 ב: coats of skins,
Gen 3:21 ג: and clothed them.
Gen 3:22 א: And the LORD God said,
Gen 3:22 ב: Behold, the man is become as one of us,
Gen 3:22 ג: to know good and evil:
Gen 3:22 ד: and now, lest he put forth his hand,
Gen 3:22 ה: and take also of the tree of life,
Gen 3:22 ו: and eat, and live for ever:
Gen 3:23 א: Therefore the LORD God sent him forth from the garden of Eden,
Gen 3:23 ב: to till the ground from whence he was taken.
Gen 3:24 א: So he drove out the man;
Gen 3:24 ב: and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubims,
Gen 3:24 ג: and a flaming sword which turned every way,
Gen 3:24 ד: to keep the way of the tree of life.
Gen 4:1 א: And Adam knew Eve his wife;
Gen 4:1 ב: and she conceived, and bare Cain,
Gen 4:1 ג: and said, I have gotten a man from the LORD.
Gen 4:2 א: And she again bare his brother Abel.
Gen 4:2 ב: And Abel was a keeper of sheep,
Gen 4:2 ג: but Cain was a tiller of the ground.
Gen 4:3 א: And in process of time it came to pass,
Gen 4:3 ב: that Cain brought of the fruit of the ground
Gen 4:3 ג: an offering unto the LORD.
Gen 4:4 א: And Abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof.
Gen 4:4 ב: And the LORD had respect unto Abel and to his offering:
Gen 4:5 א: But unto Cain and to his offering he had not respect.
Gen 4:5 ב: And Cain was very wroth,
Gen 4:5 ג: and his countenance fell.
Gen 4:6 א: And the LORD said unto Cain,
Gen 4:6 ב: Why art thou wroth?
Gen 4:6 ג: and why is thy countenance fallen?
Gen 4:7 א: If thou doest well, shalt thou not be accepted?
Gen 4:7 ב: and if thou doest not well,
Gen 4:7 ג: sin lieth at the door.
Gen 4:7 ד: And unto thee [shall be] his desire,
Gen 4:7 ה: and thou shalt rule over him.
Gen 4:8 א: And Cain talked with Abel his brother:
Gen 4:8 ב: and it came to pass, when they were in the field,
Gen 4:8 ג: that Cain rose up against Abel his brother,
Gen 4:8 ד: and slew him.
Gen 4:9 א: And the LORD said unto Cain,
Gen 4:9 ב: Where [is] Abel thy brother?
Gen 4:9 ג: And he said, I know not:
Gen 4:9 ד: [Am] I my brother’s keeper?
Gen 4:10 א: And he said, What hast thou done?
Gen 4:10 ב: the voice of thy brother’s blood crieth unto me from the ground.
Gen 4:11 א: And now [art] thou cursed from the earth,
Gen 4:11 ב: which hath opened her mouth
Gen 4:11 ג: to receive thy brother’s blood from thy hand;
Gen 4:12 א: When thou tillest the ground,
Gen 4:12 ב: it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her strength;
Gen 4:12 ג: a fugitive and a vagabond shalt thou be in the earth.
Gen 4:13 א: And Cain said unto the LORD,
Gen 4:13 ב: My punishment [is] greater than I can bear.
Gen 4:14 א: Behold, thou hast driven me out this day
Gen 4:14 ב: from the face of the earth;
Gen 4:14 ג: and from thy face shall I be hid;
Gen 4:14 ד: and I shall be a fugitive and a vagabond in the earth;
Gen 4:14 ה: and it shall come to pass, [that] every one that findeth me shall slay me.
Gen 4:15 א: And the LORD said unto him,
Gen 4:15 ב: Therefore whosoever slayeth Cain,
Gen 4:15 ג: vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold.
Gen 4:15 ד: And the LORD set a mark upon Cain,
Gen 4:15 ה: lest any finding him should kill him.
Gen 4:16 א: And Cain went out from the presence of the LORD,
Gen 4:16 ב: and dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden.
Gen 4:17 א: And Cain knew his wife;
Gen 4:17 ב: and she conceived, and bare Enoch:
Gen 4:17 ג: and he builded a city,
Gen 4:17 ד: and called the name of the city, after the name of his son, Enoch.
Gen 4:18 א: And unto Enoch was born Irad:
Gen 4:18 ב: and Irad begat Mehujael:
Gen 4:18 ג: and Mehujael begat Methusael:
Gen 4:18 ד: and Methusael begat Lamech.
Gen 4:19 א: And Lamech took unto him two wives:
Gen 4:19 ב: the name of the one [was] Adah,
Gen 4:19 ג: and the name of the other Zillah.
Gen 4:20 א: And Adah bare Jabal:
Gen 4:20 ב: he was the father of such as dwell in tents, and [of such as have] cattle.
Gen 4:21 א: And his brother’s name [was] Jubal:
Gen 4:21 ב: he was the father of all such as handle the harp and organ.
Gen 4:22 א: And Zillah, she also bare Tubal–cain,

meaning: Tubal (she causes to be borne along) Cain (acquired spearhead)
kjgv: [תוּבַל קַיִן]|[tuval kaiyin]|[Tubal] (she causes to be borne along) [Cain] (acquired spearhead)

kjv: Gen 4:22 ב: an instructer of every artificer in brass and iron:
Gen 4:22 ג: and the sister of Tubal–cain [was] Naamah.

meaning: Tubal (she causes to be borne along) Cain (acquired spearhead)
kjgv: [תוּבַל־קַיִן]|[tuval-kaiyin]|[Tubal] (she causes to be borne along) [Cain] (acquired spearhead)

kjv: Gen 4:23 א: And Lamech said unto his wives,
Gen 4:23 ב: Adah and Zillah, Hear my voice;
Gen 4:23 ג: ye wives of Lamech, hearken unto my speech:
Gen 4:23 ד: for I have slain a man to my wounding,
Gen 4:23 ה: and a young man to my hurt.
Gen 4:24 א: If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold,
Gen 4:24 ב: truly Lamech seventy and sevenfold.
Gen 4:25 א: And Adam knew his wife again;
Gen 4:25 ב: and she bare a son,
Gen 4:25 ג: and called his name Seth:
Gen 4:25 ד: For God, [said she], hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel,
Gen 4:25 ה: whom Cain slew.
Gen 4:26 א: And to Seth, to him also there was born a son;
Gen 4:26 ב: and he called his name Enos:
Gen 4:26 ג: then began men to call upon the name of the LORD.
Gen 5:1 א: This [is] the book of the generations of Adam.
Gen 5:1 ב: In the day that God created man,
Gen 5:1 ג: in the likeness of God made he him;
Gen 5:2 א: Male and female created he them;
Gen 5:2 ב: and blessed them,
Gen 5:2 ג: and called their name Adam,
Gen 5:2 ד: in the day when they were created.
Gen 5:3 א: And Adam lived an hundred and thirty years,
Gen 5:3 ב: and begat [a son] in his own likeness, after his image;
Gen 5:3 ג: and called his name Seth:
Gen 5:4 א: And the days of Adam after he had begotten Seth were
Gen 5:4 ב: eight hundred years:
Gen 5:4 ג: and he begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:5 א: And all the days that Adam lived were
Gen 5:5 ב: nine hundred and thirty years:
Gen 5:5 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:6 א: And Seth lived
Gen 5:6 ב: an hundred and five years,
Gen 5:6 ג: and begat Enos:
Gen 5:7 א: And Seth lived after he begat Enos
Gen 5:7 ב: eight hundred and seven years,
Gen 5:7 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:8 א: And all the days of Seth were
Gen 5:8 ב: nine hundred and twelve years:
Gen 5:8 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:9 א: And Enos lived ninety years,
Gen 5:9 ב: and begat Cainan:
Gen 5:10 א: And Enos lived after he begat Cainan
Gen 5:10 ב: eight hundred and fifteen years,
Gen 5:10 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:11 א: And all the days of Enos were
Gen 5:11 ב: nine hundred and five years:
Gen 5:11 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:12 א: And Cainan lived seventy years,
Gen 5:12 ב: and begat Mahalaleel:
Gen 5:13 א: And Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel
Gen 5:13 ב: eight hundred and forty years,
Gen 5:13 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:14 א: And all the days of Cainan were
Gen 5:14 ב: nine hundred and ten years:
Gen 5:14 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:15 א: And Mahalaleel lived
Gen 5:15 ב: sixty and five years,
Gen 5:15 ג: and begat Jared:
Gen 5:16 א: And Mahalaleel lived after he begat Jared
Gen 5:16 ב: eight hundred and thirty years,
Gen 5:16 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:17 א: And all the days of Mahalaleel were
Gen 5:17 ב: eight hundred ninety and five years:
Gen 5:17 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:18 א: And Jared lived
Gen 5:18 ב: an hundred sixty and two years,
Gen 5:18 ג: and he begat Enoch:
Gen 5:19 א: And Jared lived after he begat Enoch
Gen 5:19 ב: eight hundred years,
Gen 5:19 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:20 א: And all the days of Jared were
Gen 5:20 ב: nine hundred sixty and two years:
Gen 5:20 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:21 א: And Enoch lived
Gen 5:21 ב: sixty and five years,
Gen 5:21 ג: and begat Methuselah:
Gen 5:22 א: And Enoch walked with God
Gen 5:22 ב: after he begat Methuselah
Gen 5:22 ג: three hundred years,
Gen 5:22 ד: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:23 א: And all the days of Enoch were
Gen 5:23 ב: three hundred sixty and five years:
Gen 5:24 א: And Enoch walked with God:
Gen 5:24 ב: and he [was] not; for God took him.
Gen 5:25 א: And Methuselah lived
Gen 5:25 ב: an hundred eighty and seven years,
Gen 5:25 ג: and begat Lamech:
Gen 5:26 א: And Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech
Gen 5:26 ב: seven hundred eighty and two years,
Gen 5:26 ג: and begat sons and daughters:
Gen 5:27 א: And all the days of Methuselah were
Gen 5:27 ב: nine hundred sixty and nine years:
Gen 5:27 ג: and he died.
Gen 5:28 א: And Lamech lived
Gen 5:28 ב: an hundred eighty and two years,
Gen 5:28 ג: and begat a son:
Gen 5:29 א: And he called his name Noah, saying,
Gen 5:29 ב: This [same] shall comfort us concerning our work
Gen 5:29 ג: and toil of our hands,
Gen 5:29 ד: because of the ground which the LORD hath cursed.
Gen 5:30 א: And Lamech lived after he begat Noah
Gen 5:30 ב: five hundred ninety and five years,

Gen 11:15 ב: four hundred and three years,
Gen 11:15 ג: and begat sons and daughters.

Gen 11:16 ב: and begat Peleg:

Gen 11:17 ב: four hundred and thirty years,
Gen 11:17 ג: and begat sons and daughters.

Gen 11:18 ב: and begat Reu:
Gen 11:19 א: And Peleg lived after he begat Reu
Gen 11:19 ב: two hundred and nine years,
Gen 11:19 ג: and begat sons and daughters.
Gen 11:20 א: And Reu lived two and thirty years,
Gen 11:20 ב: and begat Serug:

Gen 11:21 ב: two hundred and seven years,
Gen 11:21 ג: and begat sons and daughters.
Gen 11:22 א: And Serug lived thirty years,
Gen 11:22 ב: and begat Nahor:
Gen 11:23 א: And Serug lived after he begat Nahor
Gen 11:23 ב: two hundred years,
Gen 11:23 ג: and begat sons and daughters.
Gen 11:24 א: And Nahor lived nine and twenty years,
Gen 11:24 ב: and begat Terah:
Gen 11:25 א: And Nahor lived after he begat Terah
Gen 11:25 ב: an hundred and nineteen years,
Gen 11:25 ג: and begat sons and daughters.
Gen 11:26 א: And Terah lived seventy years,
Gen 11:26 ב: and begat Abram,
Gen 11:26 ג: Nahor,
Gen 11:26 ד: and Haran.
Gen 11:27 א: Now these [are] the generations of Terah:
Gen 11:27 ב: Terah begat Abram,
Gen 11:27 ג: Nahor,
Gen 11:27 ד: and Haran;
Gen 11:27 ה: and Haran begat Lot.
Gen 11:28 א: And Haran died
Gen 11:28 ב: before his father Terah
Gen 11:28 ג: in the land of his nativity,
Gen 11:28 ד: in Ur of the Chaldees.
Gen 11:29 א: And Abram and Nahor took them wives:
Gen 11:29 ב: the name of Abram’s wife [was] Sarai;
Gen 11:29 ג: and the name of Nahor’s wife, Milcah,
Gen 11:29 ד: the daughter of Haran,
Gen 11:29 ה: the father of Milcah, and the father of Iscah.
Gen 11:30 א: But Sarai was barren;
Gen 11:30 ב: she [had] no child.
Gen 11:31 א: And Terah took Abram his son,
Gen 11:31 ב: and Lot the son of Haran
Gen 11:31 ג: his son’s son,
Gen 11:31 ד: and Sarai his daughter in law,
Gen 11:31 ה: his son Abram’s wife;
Gen 11:31 ו: and they went forth with them from Ur of the Chaldees,
Gen 11:31 ז: to go into the land of Canaan;
Gen 11:31 ח: and they came unto Haran,
Gen 11:31 ט: and dwelt there.
Gen 11:32 א: And the days of Terah were
Gen 11:32 ב: two hundred and five years:
Gen 11:32 ג: and Terah died in Haran.
Gen 12:1 א: Now the LORD had said unto Abram,
Gen 12:1 ב: Get thee out of thy country,
Gen 12:1 ג: and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house,
Gen 12:1 ד: unto a land that I will shew thee:
Gen 12:2 א: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee,
Gen 12:2 ב: and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing:
Gen 12:3 א: And I will bless them that bless thee, and curse him that curseth thee:
Gen 12:3 ב: and in thee shall all families of the earth be blessed.
Gen 12:4 א: So Abram departed, as the LORD had spoken unto him;
Gen 12:4 ב: and Lot went with him:
Gen 12:4 ג: and Abram [was] seventy and five years old
Gen 12:4 ד: when he departed out of Haran.
Gen 12:5 א: And Abram took Sarai his wife,
Gen 12:5 ב: and Lot his brother’s son,
Gen 12:5 ג: and all their substance that they had gathered,
Gen 12:5 ד: and the souls that they had gotten in Haran;
Gen 12:5 ה: and they went forth to go into the land of Canaan;
Gen 12:5 ו: and into the land of Canaan they came.
Gen 12:6 א: And Abram passed through the land unto the place of Sichem,
Gen 12:6 ב: unto the plain of Moreh.
Gen 12:6 ג: And the Canaanite [was] then in the land.
Gen 12:7 א: And the LORD appeared unto Abram,
Gen 12:7 ב: and said, Unto thy seed will I give this land:
Gen 12:7 ג: and there builded he an altar unto the LORD, who appeared unto him.
Gen 12:8 א: And he removed from thence unto a mountain
Gen 12:8 ב: on the east of Beth–el,
Gen 12:8 ג: and pitched his tent,
Gen 12:8 ד: [having] Beth–el on the west, and Hai on the east:
Gen 12:8 ה: and there he builded an altar unto the LORD,
Gen 12:8 ו: and called upon the name of the LORD.
Gen 12:9 א: And Abram journeyed,
Gen 12:9 ב: going on still toward the south.
Gen 12:10 א: And there was a famine in the land:
Gen 12:10 ב: and Abram went down into Egypt to sojourn there;
Gen 12:10 ג: for the famine [was] grievous in the land.
Gen 12:11 א: And it came to pass, when he was come near to enter into Egypt,
Gen 12:11 ב: that he said unto Sarai his wife,
Gen 12:11 ג: Behold now,
Gen 12:11 ד: I know that thou [art] a fair woman to look upon:
Gen 12:12 א: Therefore it shall come to pass, when the Egyptians shall see thee,
Gen 12:12 ב: that they shall say, This [is] his wife:
Gen 12:12 ג: and they will kill me,
Gen 12:12 ד: but they will save thee alive.
Gen 12:13 א: Say, I pray thee, thou [art] my sister:
Gen 12:13 ב: that it may be well with me for thy sake;
Gen 12:13 ג: and my soul shall live because of thee.
Gen 12:14 א: And it came to pass, that, when Abram was come into Egypt,
Gen 12:14 ב: the Egyptians beheld the woman
Gen 12:14 ג: that she [was] very fair.
Gen 12:15 א: The princes also of Pharaoh saw her,
Gen 12:15 ב: and commended her before Pharaoh:
Gen 12:15 ג: and the woman was taken into Pharaoh’s house.
Gen 12:16 א: And he entreated Abram well for her sake:
Gen 12:16 ב: and he had sheep,
Gen 12:16 ג: and oxen, and he asses, and menservants, and maidservants, and she asses, and camels.
Gen 12:17 א: And the LORD plagued Pharaoh [...] with great plagues
Gen 12:17 ב: and his house
Gen 12:17 ג: because of Sarai Abram’s wife.
Gen 12:18 א: And Pharaoh called Abram, and said,
Gen 12:18 ב: What [is] this [that] thou hast done unto me?
Gen 12:18 ג: why didst thou not tell me that she [was] thy wife?
Gen 12:19 א: Why saidst thou, She [is] my sister?
Gen 12:19 ב: so I might have taken her to me to wife:
Gen 12:19 ג: now therefore behold thy wife,
Gen 12:19 ד: take [her], and go thy way.
Gen 12:20 א: And Pharaoh commanded [his] men concerning him:
Gen 12:20 ב: and they sent him away, and his wife,
Gen 12:20 ג: and all that he had.
Gen 13:1 א: And Abram went up out of Egypt,
Gen 13:1 ב: he, and his wife, and all that he had,
Gen 13:1 ג: and Lot with him,
Gen 13:1 ד: into the south.
Gen 13:2 א: And Abram [was] very rich
Gen 13:2 ב: in cattle, in silver, and in gold.
Gen 13:3 א: And he went on his journeys from the south even to Beth–el,
Gen 13:3 ב: unto the place where his tent had been at the beginning,
Gen 13:3 ג: between Beth–el and Hai;
Gen 13:4 א: Unto the place of the altar, which he had made there at the first:
Gen 13:4 ב: and there Abram called on the name of the LORD.
Gen 13:5 א: And Lot also,
Gen 13:5 ב: which went with Abram,
Gen 13:5 ג: had flocks, and herds, and tents.
Gen 13:6 א: And the land was not able to bear them, that they might dwell together:
Gen 13:6 ב: for their substance was great,
Gen 13:6 ג: so that they could not dwell together.
Gen 13:7 א: And there was a strife between the herdmen of Abram’s cattle
Gen 13:7 ב: and the herdmen of Lot’s cattle:
Gen 13:7 ג: and the Canaanite and the Perizzite dwelled then in the land.
Gen 13:8 א: And Abram said unto Lot,
Gen 13:8 ב: Let there be no strife, I pray thee, between me and thee,
Gen 13:8 ג: and between my herdmen and thy herdmen;
Gen 13:8 ד: for we [be] brethren.
Gen 13:9 א: [Is] not the whole land before thee?
Gen 13:9 ב: separate thyself, I pray thee, from me:
Gen 13:9 ג: if [thou wilt take] the left hand, then I will go to the right;
Gen 13:9 ד: or if [thou depart] to the right hand, then I will go to the left.
Gen 13:10 א: And Lot lifted up his eyes,
Gen 13:10 ב: and beheld all the plain of Jordan,
Gen 13:10 ג: that it [was] well watered every where,
Gen 13:10 ד: before the LORD destroyed Sodom and Gomorrah,
Gen 13:10 ה: [even] as the garden of the LORD,
Gen 13:10 ו: like the land of Egypt, as thou comest unto Zoar.
Gen 13:11 א: Then Lot chose him all the plain of Jordan;
Gen 13:11 ב: and Lot journeyed east:
Gen 13:11 ג: and they separated themselves the one from the other.
Gen 13:12 א: Abram dwelled in the land of Canaan,
Gen 13:12 ב: and Lot dwelled in the cities of the plain,
Gen 13:12 ג: and pitched [his] tent toward Sodom.
Gen 13:13 א: But the men of Sodom [were] wicked
Gen 13:13 ב: and sinners before the LORD exceedingly.
Gen 13:14 א: And the LORD said unto Abram,
Gen 13:14 ב: after that Lot was separated from him,
Gen 13:14 ג: Lift up now thine eyes,
Gen 13:14 ד: and look from the place where thou art
Gen 13:14 ה: northward, and southward, and eastward, and westward:
Gen 13:15 א: For all the land which thou seest,
Gen 13:15 ב: to thee will I give it, and to thy seed
Gen 13:15 ג: for ever.
Gen 13:16 א: And I will make thy seed as the dust of the earth:
Gen 13:16 ב: so that if a man can number the dust of the earth,
Gen 13:16 ג: [then] shall thy seed also be numbered.
Gen 13:17 א: Arise, walk through the land in the length of it and in the breadth of it;
Gen 13:17 ב: for I will give it unto thee.
Gen 13:18 א: Then Abram removed [his] tent,
Gen 13:18 ב: and came and dwelt in the plain of Mamre,
Gen 13:18 ג: which [is] in Hebron,
Gen 13:18 ד: and built there an altar unto the LORD.
Gen 14:1 א: And it came to pass in the days of Amraphel king of Shinar,
Gen 14:1 ב: Arioch king of Ellasar,
Gen 14:1 ג: Chedorlaomer king of Elam,
Gen 14:1 ד: and Tidal king of nations;
Gen 14:2 א: [That these] made war with Bera king of Sodom,
Gen 14:2 ב: and with Birsha king of Gomorrah,
Gen 14:2 ג: Shinab king of Admah,
Gen 14:2 ד: and Shemeber king of Zeboiim,
Gen 14:2 ה: and the king of Bela, which is Zoar.
Gen 14:3 א: All these were joined together in the vale of Siddim,
Gen 14:3 ב: which is the salt sea.
Gen 14:4 א: Twelve years they served Chedorlaomer,
Gen 14:4 ב: and in the thirteenth year they rebelled.
Gen 14:5 א: And in the fourteenth year came Chedorlaomer,
Gen 14:5 ב: and the kings that [were] with him,
Gen 14:5 ג: and smote the Rephaims in Ashteroth Karnaim,
Gen 14:5 ד: and the Zuzims in Ham,
Gen 14:5 ה: and the Emims in Shaveh Kiriathaim,
Gen 14:6 א: And the Horites in their mount Seir,
Gen 14:6 ב: unto El–paran, which [is] by the wilderness.
Gen 14:7 א: And they returned, and came to En–mishpat,
Gen 14:7 ב: which [is] Kadesh,
Gen 14:7 ג: and smote all the country of the Amalekites,

Gen 14:18 א: And Melchizedek king of Salem
Gen 14:18 ב: brought forth bread and wine:

Gen 14:19 א: And he blessed him, and said,

Gen 14:19 ג: possessor of heaven and earth:
Gen 14:20 א: And blessed be the most high God,
Gen 14:20 ב: which hath delivered thine enemies into thy hand.

Gen 14:21 ב: Give me the persons,
Gen 14:21 ג: and take the goods to thyself.

Gen 14:22 ב: I have lift up mine hand unto the LORD, the most high God,

Gen 14:24 א: Save only that which the young men have eaten,
Gen 14:24 ב: and the portion of the men which went with me,
Gen 14:24 ג: Aner, Eshcol, and Mamre;

Gen 15:1 א: After these things
Gen 15:1 ב: the word of the LORD came unto Abram in a vision, saying,
Gen 15:1 ג: Fear not, Abram:
Gen 15:1 ד: I [am] thy shield,
Gen 15:1 ה: [and] thy exceeding great reward.
Gen 15:2 א: And Abram said,

Gen 15:2 ד: and the steward of my house

Gen 15:3 א: And Abram said,
Gen 15:3 ב: Behold, to me thou hast given no seed:
Gen 15:3 ג: and, lo, one born in my house is mine heir.
Gen 15:4 א: And, behold, the word of the LORD [came] unto him, saying,
Gen 15:4 ב: This shall not be thine heir;
Gen 15:4 ג: but [...] that shall come forth out of thine own bowels

Gen 15:5 א: And he brought him forth abroad, and said,

Gen 15:5 ג: and tell the stars, if thou be able to number them:
Gen 15:5 ד: and he said unto him,

Gen 15:6 א: And he believed in the LORD;
Gen 15:6 ב: and he counted it to him for righteousness.
Gen 15:7 א: And he said unto him,
Gen 15:7 ב: I [am] the LORD that brought thee out of Ur of the Chaldees,
Gen 15:7 ג: to give thee this land to inherit it.
Gen 15:8 א: And he said, Lord GOD,
Gen 15:8 ב: whereby shall I know that I shall inherit it?
Gen 15:9 א: And he said unto him,
Gen 15:9 ב: Take me an heifer of three years old,
Gen 15:9 ג: and a she goat of three years old,
Gen 15:9 ד: and a ram of three years old,
Gen 15:9 ה: and a turtledove, and a young pigeon.
Gen 15:10 א: And he took unto him all these,
Gen 15:10 ב: and divided them in the midst,
Gen 15:10 ג: and laid each piece one against another:
Gen 15:10 ד: but the birds divided he not.
Gen 15:11 א: And when the fowls came down upon the carcases,
Gen 15:11 ב: Abram drove them away.
Gen 15:12 א: And when the sun was going down,
Gen 15:12 ב: a deep sleep fell upon Abram;
Gen 15:12 ג: and, lo, an horror of great darkness
Gen 15:12 ד: fell upon him.
Gen 15:13 א: And he said unto Abram,
Gen 15:13 ב: Know of a surety that thy seed shall be a stranger in a land [that is] not theirs,
Gen 15:13 ג: and shall serve them;
Gen 15:13 ד: and they shall afflict them four hundred years;
Gen 15:14 א: And also that nation, whom they shall serve, will I judge:
Gen 15:14 ב: and afterward shall they come out with great substance.
Gen 15:15 א: And thou shalt go to thy fathers in peace;
Gen 15:15 ב: thou shalt be buried in a good old age.
Gen 15:16 א: But in the fourth generation they shall come hither again:
Gen 15:16 ב: for the iniquity of the Amorites [is] not yet full.
Gen 15:17 א: And it came to pass, that, when the sun went down,
Gen 15:17 ב: and it was dark,
Gen 15:17 ג: behold a smoking furnace,
Gen 15:17 ד: and a burning lamp
Gen 15:17 ה: that passed between those pieces.
Gen 15:18 א: In the same day the LORD made a covenant with Abram, saying,
Gen 15:18 ב: Unto thy seed have I given this land,
Gen 15:18 ג: from the river of Egypt
Gen 15:18 ד: unto the great river, the river Euphrates:
Gen 15:19 א: The Kenites, and the Kenizzites, and the Kadmonites,
Gen 15:20 א: And the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Rephaims,
Gen 15:21 א: And the Amorites, and the Canaanites, and the Girgashites, and the Jebusites.
Gen 16:1 א: Now Sarai Abram’s wife
Gen 16:1 ב: bare him no children:
Gen 16:1 ג: and she had an handmaid, an Egyptian,
Gen 16:1 ד: whose name [was] Hagar.
Gen 16:2 א: And Sarai said unto Abram,
Gen 16:2 ב: Behold now, the LORD hath restrained me from bearing:
Gen 16:2 ג: I pray thee, go in unto my maid;
Gen 16:2 ד: it may be that I may obtain children by her.
Gen 16:2 ה: And Abram hearkened to the voice of Sarai.
Gen 16:3 א: And Sarai Abram’s wife took Hagar [...] the Egyptian,
Gen 16:3 ב: her maid [...] after Abram had dwelt ten years in the land of Canaan,
Gen 16:3 ג: and gave her to her husband Abram to be his wife.
Gen 16:4 א: And he went in unto Hagar, and she conceived:
Gen 16:4 ב: and when she saw that she had conceived,
Gen 16:4 ג: her mistress was despised in her eyes.
Gen 16:5 א: And Sarai said unto Abram,
Gen 16:5 ב: My wrong [be] upon thee:
Gen 16:5 ג: I have given my maid into thy bosom;
Gen 16:5 ד: and when she saw that she had conceived,
Gen 16:5 ה: I was despised in her eyes:
Gen 16:5 ו: the LORD judge between me and thee.
Gen 16:6 א: But Abram said unto Sarai,
Gen 16:6 ב: Behold, thy maid [is] in thy hand;
Gen 16:6 ג: do to her as it pleaseth thee.
Gen 16:6 ד: And when Sarai dealt hardly with her,
Gen 16:6 ה: she fled from her face.
Gen 16:7 א: And the angel of the LORD found her
Gen 16:7 ב: by a fountain of water in the wilderness,
Gen 16:7 ג: by the fountain in the way to Shur.
Gen 16:8 א: And he said, Hagar, Sarai’s maid,
Gen 16:8 ב: whence camest thou?
Gen 16:8 ג: and whither wilt thou go?
Gen 16:8 ד: And she said, I flee from the face of my mistress Sarai.
Gen 16:9 א: And the angel of the LORD said unto her,
Gen 16:9 ב: Return to thy mistress,
Gen 16:9 ג: and submit thyself under her hands.
Gen 16:10 א: And the angel of the LORD said unto her,
Gen 16:10 ב: I will multiply thy seed exceedingly,
Gen 16:10 ג: that it shall not be numbered for multitude.
Gen 16:11 א: And the angel of the LORD said unto her,
Gen 16:11 ב: Behold, thou [art] with child, and shalt bear a son,
Gen 16:11 ג: and shalt call his name Ishmael;
Gen 16:11 ד: because the LORD hath heard thy affliction.
Gen 16:12 א: And he will be a wild man;
Gen 16:12 ב: his hand [will be] against every man,
Gen 16:12 ג: and every man’s hand against him;
Gen 16:12 ד: and he shall dwell in the presence of all his brethren.
Gen 16:13 א: And she called the name of the LORD that spake unto her,
Gen 16:13 ב: Thou God seest me:
Gen 16:13 ג: for she said,
Gen 16:13 ד: Have I also here looked after him that seeth me?
Gen 16:14 א: Wherefore the well was called Beer–lahai–roi;
