kjv: Gen 25:12 א: Now these [are] the generations of Ishmael, Abraham’s son,
Gen 25:12 ב: whom Hagar the Egyptian, [...] bare
Gen 25:12 ג: Sarah’s handmaid,
Gen 25:12 ד: unto Abraham:
Gen 25:13 א: And these [are] the names of the sons of Ishmael,
Gen 25:13 ב: by their names, according to their generations:
Gen 25:13 ג: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebajoth;
Gen 25:13 ד: and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
Gen 25:14 א: And Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa,
Gen 25:15 א: Hadar, and Tema,
Gen 25:15 ב: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah:
Gen 25:16 א: These [are] the sons of Ishmael,
Gen 25:16 ב: and these [are] their names, by their towns, and by their castles;
Gen 25:16 ג: twelve princes according to their nations.
Gen 25:17 א: And these [are] the years of the life of Ishmael,
Gen 25:17 ב: an hundred and thirty and seven years:
Gen 25:17 ג: and he gave up the ghost and died;
Gen 25:17 ד: and was gathered unto his people.
Gen 25:18 א: And they dwelt from Havilah unto Shur,
Gen 25:18 ב: that [is] before Egypt,
Gen 25:18 ג: as thou goest toward Assyria:
Gen 25:18 ד: [and] he died in the presence of all his brethren.
Gen 25:19 א: And these [are] the generations of Isaac,
Gen 25:19 ב: Abraham’s son:
Gen 25:19 ג: Abraham begat Isaac:
Gen 25:20 א: And Isaac was forty years old
Gen 25:20 ב: when he took Rebekah [...] the daughter of Bethuel
Gen 25:20 ג: the Syrian of Padan–aram,
Gen 25:20 ד: the sister to Laban the Syrian.
Gen 25:20 ה: to wife,
Gen 25:21 א: And Isaac intreated the LORD for his wife,
Gen 25:21 ב: because she [was] barren:
Gen 25:21 ג: and the LORD was intreated of him,
Gen 25:21 ד: and Rebekah his wife conceived.
Gen 25:22 א: And the children struggled together within her; and she said,
Gen 25:22 ב: If [it be] so, why [am] I thus?
Gen 25:22 ג: And she went to inquire of the LORD.
Gen 25:23 א: And the LORD said unto her,
Gen 25:23 ב: Two nations [are] in thy womb,
Gen 25:23 ג: and two manner of people shall be separated from thy bowels;
Gen 25:23 ד: and [the one] people shall be stronger than [the other] people;
Gen 25:23 ה: and the elder shall serve the younger.
Gen 25:24 א: And when her days to be delivered were fulfilled,
Gen 25:24 ב: behold, [there were] twins in her womb.
Gen 25:25 א: And the first came out red, all over
Gen 25:25 ב: like an hairy garment;
Gen 25:25 ג: and they called his name Esau.
Gen 25:26 א: And after that came his brother out,
Gen 25:26 ב: and his hand took hold on Esau’s heel;
Gen 25:26 ג: and his name was called Jacob:
Gen 25:26 ד: and Isaac [was] threescore years old when she bare them.
Gen 25:27 א: And the boys grew:
Gen 25:27 ב: and Esau was a cunning hunter,
Gen 25:27 ג: a man of the field;
Gen 25:27 ד: and Jacob [was] a plain man,
Gen 25:27 ה: dwelling in tents.
Gen 25:28 א: And Isaac loved Esau,
Gen 25:28 ב: because he did eat of [his] venison:
Gen 25:28 ג: but Rebekah loved Jacob.
Gen 25:29 א: And Jacob sod pottage:
Gen 25:29 ב: and Esau came from the field,
Gen 25:29 ג: and he [was] faint:
Gen 25:30 א: And Esau said to Jacob,
Gen 25:30 ב: Feed me, I pray thee, with that same red [pottage];
Gen 25:30 ג: for I [am] faint:
Gen 25:30 ד: therefore was his name called Edom.
Gen 25:31 א: And Jacob said,
Gen 25:31 ב: Sell me this day thy birthright.
Gen 25:32 א: And Esau said,
Gen 25:32 ב: Behold, I [am] at the point to die:
Gen 25:32 ג: and what profit shall this birthright do to me?
Gen 25:33 א: And Jacob said,
Gen 25:33 ב: Swear to me this day;
Gen 25:33 ג: and he sware unto him:
Gen 25:33 ד: and he sold his birthright unto Jacob.
Gen 25:34 א: Then Jacob gave Esau bread and pottage of lentiles;
Gen 25:34 ב: and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way:
Gen 25:34 ג: thus Esau despised [his] birthright.
Gen 26:1 א: And there was a famine in the land,
Gen 26:1 ב: beside the first famine
Gen 26:1 ג: that was in the days of Abraham.
Gen 26:1 ד: And Isaac went unto Abimelech
Gen 26:1 ה: king of the Philistines
Gen 26:1 ו: unto Gerar.
Gen 26:2 א: And the LORD appeared unto him, and said,
Gen 26:2 ב: Go not down into Egypt;
Gen 26:2 ג: dwell in the land which I shall tell thee of:
Gen 26:3 א: Sojourn in this land,
Gen 26:3 ב: and I will be with thee, and will bless thee;
Gen 26:3 ג: for unto thee, and unto thy seed, I will give all these countries,
Gen 26:3 ד: and I will perform the oath which I sware unto Abraham thy father;
Gen 26:4 א: And I will make thy seed to multiply as the stars of heaven,
Gen 26:4 ב: and will give unto thy seed all these countries;
Gen 26:4 ג: and in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed;
Gen 26:5 א: Because that Abraham obeyed my voice,
Gen 26:5 ב: and kept my charge,
Gen 26:5 ג: my commandments, my statutes, and my laws.
Gen 26:6 א: And Isaac dwelt in Gerar:
Gen 26:7 א: And the men of the place asked [him] of his wife;
Gen 26:7 ב: and he said, She [is] my sister:
Gen 26:7 ג: for he feared to say, [She is] my wife;
Gen 26:7 ד: lest, [said he], the men of the place should kill me for Rebekah;
Gen 26:7 ה: because she [was] fair to look upon.
Gen 26:8 א: And it came to pass, when he had been there a long time,
Gen 26:8 ב: that Abimelech king of the Philistines looked out at a window,
Gen 26:8 ג: and saw, and, behold, Isaac [was] sporting with Rebekah his wife.
Gen 26:9 א: And Abimelech called Isaac, and said,
Gen 26:9 ב: Behold, of a surety she [is] thy wife:
Gen 26:9 ג: and how saidst thou, She [is] my sister?
Gen 26:9 ד: And Isaac said unto him,
Gen 26:9 ה: Because I said, Lest I die for her.
Gen 26:10 א: And Abimelech said,
Gen 26:10 ב: What [is] this thou hast done unto us?
Gen 26:10 ג: one of the people might lightly have lien with thy wife,
Gen 26:10 ד: and thou shouldest have brought guiltiness upon us.
Gen 26:11 א: And Abimelech charged all [his] people, saying,
Gen 26:11 ב: He that toucheth this man or his wife
Gen 26:11 ג: shall surely be put to death.
Gen 26:12 א: Then Isaac sowed in that land,
Gen 26:12 ב: and received in the same year an hundredfold:
Gen 26:12 ג: and the LORD blessed him.
Gen 26:13 א: And the man waxed great, and went forward,
Gen 26:13 ב: and grew
Gen 26:13 ג: until he became very great:
Gen 26:14 א: For he had possession of flocks,
Gen 26:14 ב: and possession of herds,
Gen 26:14 ג: and great store of servants:
Gen 26:14 ד: and the Philistines envied him.
Gen 26:15 א: For all the wells which his father’s servants had digged
Gen 26:15 ב: in the days of Abraham his father,
Gen 26:15 ג: the Philistines had stopped them,
Gen 26:15 ד: and filled them with earth.
Gen 26:16 א: And Abimelech said unto Isaac,
Gen 26:16 ב: Go from us;
Gen 26:16 ג: for thou art much mightier than we.
Gen 26:17 א: And Isaac departed thence,
Gen 26:17 ב: and pitched his tent in the valley of Gerar,
Gen 26:17 ג: and dwelt there.
Gen 26:18 א: And Isaac digged again the wells of water,
Gen 26:18 ב: which they had digged in the days of Abraham his father;
Gen 26:18 ג: for the Philistines had stopped them
Gen 26:18 ד: after the death of Abraham:
Gen 26:18 ה: and he called their names
Gen 26:18 ו: after the names by which his father had called them.
Gen 26:19 א: And Isaac’s servants digged in the valley,
Gen 26:19 ב: and found there a well of springing water.
Gen 26:20 א: And the herdmen of Gerar did strive with Isaac’s herdmen, saying,
Gen 26:20 ב: The water [is] ours:
Gen 26:20 ג: and he called the name of the well Esek;
Gen 26:20 ד: because they strove with him.
Gen 26:21 א: And they digged another well,
Gen 26:21 ב: and strove for that also:
Gen 26:21 ג: and he called the name of it Sitnah.
Gen 26:22 א: And he removed from thence, and digged another well;
Gen 26:22 ב: and for that they strove not:
Gen 26:22 ג: and he called the name of it Rehoboth;
Gen 26:22 ד: and he said, For now the LORD hath made room for us,
Gen 26:22 ה: and we shall be fruitful in the land.
Gen 26:23 א: And he went up from thence to Beer–sheba.
Gen 26:24 א: And the LORD appeared unto him the same night, and said,
Gen 26:24 ב: I [am] the God of Abraham thy father:
Gen 26:24 ג: fear not,
Gen 26:24 ד: for I [am] with thee,
Gen 26:24 ה: and will bless thee,
Gen 26:24 ו: and multiply thy seed for my servant Abraham’s sake.
Gen 26:25 א: And he builded an altar there,
Gen 26:25 ב: and called upon the name of the LORD,
Gen 26:25 ג: and pitched his tent there:
Gen 26:25 ד: and there Isaac’s servants digged a well.
Gen 26:26 א: Then Abimelech went to him from Gerar,
Gen 26:26 ב: and Ahuzzath one of his friends,
Gen 26:26 ג: and Phichol the chief captain of his army.
Gen 26:27 א: And Isaac said unto them,
Gen 26:27 ב: Wherefore come ye to me,
Gen 26:27 ג: seeing ye hate me,
Gen 26:27 ד: and have sent me away from you?
Gen 26:28 א: And they said,
Gen 26:28 ב: We saw certainly that the LORD was with thee:
Gen 26:28 ג: and we said, Let there be now an oath betwixt us,
Gen 26:28 ד: [even] betwixt us and thee,
Gen 26:28 ה: and let us make a covenant with thee;
Gen 26:29 א: That thou wilt do us no hurt,
Gen 26:29 ב: as we have not touched thee,
Gen 26:29 ג: and as we have done unto thee nothing but good,
Gen 26:29 ד: and have sent thee away in peace:
Gen 26:29 ה: thou [art] now the blessed of the LORD.
Gen 26:30 א: And he made them a feast,
Gen 26:30 ב: and they did eat and drink.
Gen 26:31 א: And they rose up betimes in the morning,
Gen 26:31 ב: and sware one to another:
Gen 26:31 ג: and Isaac sent them away,
Gen 26:31 ד: and they departed from him in peace.
Gen 26:32 א: And it came to pass the same day,
Gen 26:32 ב: that Isaac’s servants came,
Gen 26:32 ג: and told him concerning the well which they had digged,
Gen 26:32 ד: and said unto him,
Gen 26:32 ה: We have found water.
Gen 26:33 א: And he called it Shebah:
Gen 26:33 ב: therefore the name of the city [is] Beer–sheba
Gen 26:33 ג: unto this day.
Gen 26:34 א: And Esau was forty years old
Gen 26:34 ב: when he took to wife Judith
Gen 26:34 ג: the daughter of Beeri the Hittite,
Gen 26:34 ד: and Bashemath
Gen 26:34 ה: the daughter of Elon the Hittite:
Gen 26:35 א: Which were a grief of mind
Gen 26:35 ב: unto Isaac and to Rebekah.
Gen 27:1 א: And it came to pass, [...] when Isaac was old,
Gen 27:1 ב: and his eyes were dim, so that he could not see,
Gen 27:1 ג: that [...] he called Esau his eldest son,
Gen 27:1 ד: and said unto him, My son:
Gen 27:1 ה: and he said unto him, Behold, [here am] I.
Gen 27:2 א: And he said, Behold now, I am old,
Gen 27:2 ב: I know not the day of my death:
Gen 27:3 א: Now therefore take, I pray thee, thy weapons,
Gen 27:3 ב: thy quiver and thy bow,
Gen 27:3 ג: and go out to the field,
Gen 27:3 ד: and take me [some] venison;
Gen 27:4 א: And make me savoury meat, such as I love,
Gen 27:4 ב: and bring [it] to me, that I may eat;
Gen 27:4 ג: that my soul may bless thee before I die.
Gen 27:5 א: And Rebekah heard when Isaac spake to Esau his son.
Gen 27:5 ב: And Esau went to the field to hunt [for] venison, [and] to bring [it].
Gen 27:6 א: And Rebekah spake unto Jacob her son, saying,
Gen 27:6 ב: Behold, I heard thy father
Gen 27:6 ג: speak unto Esau thy brother, saying,
Gen 27:7 א: Bring me venison,
Gen 27:7 ב: and make me savoury meat,
Gen 27:7 ג: that I may eat,
Gen 27:7 ד: and bless thee before the LORD
Gen 27:7 ה: before my death.
Gen 27:8 א: Now therefore, my son, obey my voice
Gen 27:8 ב: according to that which I command thee.
Gen 27:9 א: Go now to the flock,
Gen 27:9 ב: and fetch me from thence
Gen 27:9 ג: two good kids of the goats;
Gen 27:9 ד: and I will make them savoury meat for thy father,
Gen 27:9 ה: such as he loveth:
Gen 27:10 א: And thou shalt bring [it] to thy father, that he may eat,
Gen 27:10 ב: and that he may bless thee before his death.
Gen 27:11 א: And Jacob said to Rebekah his mother,
Gen 27:11 ב: Behold, Esau my brother [is] a hairy man,
Gen 27:11 ג: and I [am] a smooth man:
Gen 27:12 א: My father peradventure will feel me,
Gen 27:12 ב: and I shall seem to him as a deceiver;
Gen 27:12 ג: and I shall bring a curse upon me,
Gen 27:12 ד: and not a blessing.
Gen 27:13 א: And his mother said unto him,
Gen 27:13 ב: Upon me [be] thy curse, my son:
Gen 27:13 ג: only obey my voice, and go
Gen 27:13 ד: fetch me [them].
Gen 27:14 א: And he went, and fetched, and brought [them] to his mother:
Gen 27:14 ב: and his mother made savoury meat,
Gen 27:14 ג: such as his father loved.
Gen 27:15 א: And Rebekah took [...] raiment of her eldest son Esau,
Gen 27:15 ב: goodly [...] which [were] with her in the house,
Gen 27:15 ג: and put them upon Jacob her younger son:
Gen 27:16 א: And [...] the skins of the kids of the goats
Gen 27:16 ב: she put [...] upon his hands,
Gen 27:16 ג: and upon the smooth of his neck:
Gen 27:17 א: And she gave the savoury meat
Gen 27:17 ב: and the bread, which she had prepared,
Gen 27:17 ג: into the hand of her son Jacob.
Gen 27:18 א: And he came unto his father,
Gen 27:18 ב: and said, My father:
Gen 27:18 ג: and he said, Here [am] I;
Gen 27:18 ד: who [art] thou, my son?
Gen 27:19 א: And Jacob said unto his father,
Gen 27:19 ב: I [am] Esau thy firstborn;
Gen 27:19 ג: I have done according as thou badest me:
Gen 27:19 ד: arise, I pray thee,
Gen 27:19 ה: sit and eat of my venison,
Gen 27:19 ו: that thy soul may bless me.
Gen 27:20 א: And Isaac said unto his son,
Gen 27:20 ב: How [is it] that thou hast found [it] so quickly, my son?
Gen 27:20 ג: And he said, Because the LORD thy God brought [it] to me.
Gen 27:21 א: And Isaac said unto Jacob, Come near, I pray thee,
Gen 27:21 ב: that I may feel thee, my son,
Gen 27:21 ג: whether thou [be] my very son Esau or not.
Gen 27:22 א: And Jacob went near unto Isaac his father;
Gen 27:22 ב: and he felt him, and said,
Gen 27:22 ג: The voice [is] Jacob’s voice,
Gen 27:22 ד: but the hands [are] the hands of Esau.
Gen 27:23 א: And he discerned him not,
Gen 27:23 ב: because his hands were [...] as [...] Esau’s hands:
Gen 27:23 ג: hairy, [...] his brother
Gen 27:23 ד: so he blessed him.
Gen 27:24 א: And he said,
Gen 27:24 ב: [Art] thou my very son Esau?
Gen 27:24 ג: And he said, I [am].
Gen 27:25 א: And he said, Bring [it] near to me,
Gen 27:25 ב: and I will eat of my son’s venison,
Gen 27:25 ג: that my soul may bless thee.
Gen 27:25 ד: And he brought [it] near to him, and he did eat:
Gen 27:25 ה: and he brought him wine, and he drank.
Gen 27:26 א: And his father Isaac said unto him,
Gen 27:26 ב: Come near now,
Gen 27:26 ג: and kiss me, my son.
Gen 27:27 א: And he came near, and kissed him:
Gen 27:27 ב: and he smelled the smell of his raiment,
Gen 27:27 ג: and blessed him, and said,
Gen 27:27 ד: See, the smell of my son [is] as the smell of a field
Gen 27:27 ה: which the LORD hath blessed:
Gen 27:28 א: Therefore God give thee of the dew of heaven,
Gen 27:28 ב: and the fatness of the earth,
Gen 27:28 ג: and plenty of corn
Gen 27:28 ד: and wine:
Gen 27:29 א: Let people serve thee,
Gen 27:29 ב: and nations bow down to thee:
Gen 27:29 ג: be lord over thy brethren,
Gen 27:29 ד: and let thy mother’s sons bow down to thee:
Gen 27:29 ה: cursed [be] every one that curseth thee,
Gen 27:29 ו: and blessed [be] he that blesseth thee.
Gen 27:30 א: And it came to pass, as soon as Isaac had made an end of blessing Jacob,
Gen 27:30 ב: and Jacob was yet scarce gone out
Gen 27:30 ג: from the presence of Isaac his father,
Gen 27:30 ד: that Esau his brother came in from his hunting.
Gen 27:31 א: And he also had made savoury meat,
Gen 27:31 ב: and brought it unto his father,
Gen 27:31 ג: and said unto his father,
Gen 27:31 ד: Let my father arise, and eat of his son’s venison,
Gen 27:31 ה: that thy soul may bless me.
Gen 27:32 א: And Isaac his father said unto him,
Gen 27:32 ב: Who [art] thou?
Gen 27:32 ג: And he said, I [am] thy son,
Gen 27:32 ד: thy firstborn Esau.
Gen 27:33 א: And Isaac trembled very
Gen 27:33 ב: exceedingly, and said,
Gen 27:33 ג: Who? where [is] he that hath taken venison,
Gen 27:33 ד: and brought [it] me,
Gen 27:33 ה: and I have eaten of all before thou camest,
Gen 27:33 ו: and have blessed him?
Gen 27:33 ז: yea, [and] he shall be blessed.
Gen 27:34 א: when Esau heard the words of his father,
Gen 27:34 ב: And [...] he cried with a great [...] cry,
Gen 27:34 ג: and exceeding bitter
Gen 27:34 ד: and said unto his father,
Gen 27:34 ה: Bless me, [even] me also, O my father.
Gen 27:35 א: And he said, Thy brother came with subtilty,
Gen 27:35 ב: and hath taken away thy blessing.
Gen 27:36 א: And he said, Is not he rightly named Jacob?
Gen 27:36 ב: for he hath supplanted me these two times:
Gen 27:36 ג: he took away my birthright;
Gen 27:36 ד: and, behold, now he hath taken away my blessing.
Gen 27:36 ה: And he said, Hast thou not reserved a blessing for me?
Gen 27:37 א: And Isaac answered and said unto Esau,
Gen 27:37 ב: Behold, I have made him thy lord,
Gen 27:37 ג: and all his brethren have I given to him for servants;
Gen 27:37 ד: and with corn and wine have I sustained him:
Gen 27:37 ה: and what shall I do now unto thee, my son?
Gen 27:38 א: And Esau said unto his father,
Gen 27:38 ב: Hast thou but one blessing, my father?
Gen 27:38 ג: bless me, [even] me also, O my father.
Gen 27:38 ד: And Esau lifted up his voice, and wept.
Gen 27:39 א: And Isaac his father answered and said unto him,
Gen 27:39 ב: Behold, thy dwelling shall be the fatness of the earth,
Gen 27:39 ג: and of the dew of heaven from above;
Gen 27:40 א: And by thy sword shalt thou live,
Gen 27:40 ב: and shalt serve thy brother;
Gen 27:40 ג: and it shall come to pass when thou shalt have the dominion,
Gen 27:40 ד: that thou shalt break his yoke from off thy neck.
Gen 27:41 א: And Esau hated Jacob
Gen 27:41 ב: because of the blessing wherewith his father blessed him:
Gen 27:41 ג: and Esau said in his heart,
Gen 27:41 ד: The days of mourning for my father are at hand;
Gen 27:41 ה: then will I slay my brother Jacob.
Gen 27:42 א: And these words of Esau her elder son were told to Rebekah:
Gen 27:42 ב: and she sent and called Jacob her younger son,
Gen 27:42 ג: and said unto him,
Gen 27:42 ד: Behold, thy brother Esau, as touching thee, doth comfort himself, [purposing] to kill thee.
Gen 27:43 א: Now therefore, my son, obey my voice; and arise,
Gen 27:43 ב: flee thou to Laban my brother to Haran;
Gen 27:44 א: And tarry with him a few days,
Gen 27:44 ב: until thy brother’s fury turn away;
Gen 27:45 א: Until thy brother’s anger turn away from thee,
Gen 27:45 ב: and he forget [that] which thou hast done to him:
Gen 27:45 ג: then I will send, and fetch thee from thence:
Gen 27:45 ד: why should I be deprived also of you both in one day?
Gen 27:46 א: And Rebekah said to Isaac,
Gen 27:46 ב: I am weary of my life
Gen 27:46 ג: because of the daughters of Heth:
Gen 27:46 ד: if Jacob take a wife of the daughters of Heth,
Gen 27:46 ה: such as these [which are] of the daughters of the land,
Gen 27:46 ו: what good shall my life do me?
Gen 28:1 א: And Isaac called Jacob,
Gen 28:1 ב: and blessed him,
Gen 28:1 ג: and charged him, and said unto him,
Gen 28:1 ד: Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan.
Gen 28:2 א: Arise, go to Padan–aram,
Gen 28:2 ב: to the house of Bethuel thy mother’s father;
Gen 28:2 ג: and take thee a wife from thence of the daughters of Laban
Gen 28:2 ד: thy mother’s brother.
Gen 28:3 א: And God Almighty
Gen 28:3 ב: bless thee,
Gen 28:3 ג: and make thee fruitful,
Gen 28:3 ד: and multiply thee,
Gen 28:3 ה: that thou mayest be a multitude of people;
Gen 28:4 א: And give thee the blessing of Abraham, to thee,
Gen 28:4 ב: and to thy seed with thee;
Gen 28:4 ג: that thou mayest inherit the land wherein thou art a stranger,
Gen 28:4 ד: which God gave unto Abraham.
Gen 28:5 א: And Isaac sent away Jacob:
Gen 28:5 ב: and he went to Padan–aram
Gen 28:5 ג: unto Laban, son of Bethuel the Syrian,
Gen 28:5 ד: the brother of Rebekah,
Gen 28:5 ה: Jacob’s and Esau’s mother.
Gen 28:6 א: When Esau saw that Isaac had blessed Jacob,
Gen 28:6 ב: and sent him away to Padan–aram,
Gen 28:6 ג: to take him a wife from thence;
Gen 28:6 ד: that as he blessed him
Gen 28:6 ה: and [...] he gave him a charge, saying,
Gen 28:6 ו: Thou shalt not take a wife of the daughters of Canaan;
Gen 28:7 א: And that Jacob obeyed his father
Gen 28:7 ב: and his mother,
Gen 28:7 ג: and was gone to Padan–aram;
Gen 28:8 א: And Esau seeing that the daughters of Canaan pleased not
Gen 28:8 ב: Isaac his father;
Gen 28:9 א: Then went Esau unto Ishmael,
Gen 28:9 ב: and took [...] Mahalath the daughter of Ishmael
Gen 28:9 ג: Abraham’s son, the sister of Nebajoth,
Gen 28:9 ד: unto the wives which he had [...] to be his wife.
Gen 28:10 א: And Jacob went out from Beer–sheba,
Gen 28:10 ב: and went toward Haran.
Gen 28:11 א: And he lighted upon a certain place, and tarried there all night,
Gen 28:11 ב: because the sun was set;
Gen 28:11 ג: and he took of the stones of that place,
Gen 28:11 ד: and put [them for] his pillows,
Gen 28:11 ה: and lay down in that place to sleep.
Gen 28:12 א: And he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth,
Gen 28:12 ב: and the top of it reached to heaven:
Gen 28:12 ג: and behold the angels of God ascending and descending on it.
Gen 28:13 א: And, behold, the LORD stood above it, and said,
Gen 28:13 ב: I [am] the LORD
Gen 28:13 ג: God of Abraham thy father,
Gen 28:13 ד: and the God of Isaac:
Gen 28:13 ה: the land whereon thou liest,
Gen 28:13 ו: to thee will I give it,
Gen 28:13 ז: and to thy seed;
Gen 28:14 א: And thy seed shall be as the dust of the earth,
Gen 28:14 ב: and thou shalt spread abroad to the west, and to the east, and to the north, and to the south:
Gen 28:14 ג: and in thee [...] shall all the families of the earth be blessed.
Gen 28:14 ד: and in thy seed
Gen 28:15 א: And, behold, I [am] with thee,
Gen 28:15 ב: and will keep thee in all [places] whither thou goest,
Gen 28:15 ג: and will bring thee again into this land;
Gen 28:15 ד: for I will not leave thee,
Gen 28:15 ה: until I have done [that] which
Gen 28:15 ו: I have spoken to thee of.
Gen 28:16 א: And Jacob awaked out of his sleep, and he said,
Gen 28:16 ב: Surely the LORD is in this place;
Gen 28:16 ג: and I knew [it] not.
Gen 28:17 א: And he was afraid, and said,
Gen 28:17 ב: How dreadful [is] this place!
Gen 28:17 ג: this [is] none other but the house of God,
Gen 28:17 ד: and this [is] the gate of heaven.
Gen 28:18 א: And Jacob rose up early in the morning,
Gen 28:18 ב: and took the stone that he had put [for] his pillows,
Gen 28:18 ג: and set it up [for] a pillar,
Gen 28:18 ד: and poured oil upon the top of it.
Gen 28:19 א: And he called the name of that place Beth–el:
Gen 28:19 ב: but the name of that city [was called] Luz at the first.
Gen 28:20 א: And Jacob vowed a vow, saying,
Gen 28:20 ב: If God will be with me,
Gen 28:20 ג: and will keep me in this way that I go,
Gen 28:20 ד: and will give me bread to eat,
Gen 28:20 ה: and raiment to put on,
Gen 28:21 א: So that I come again to my father’s house in peace;
Gen 28:21 ב: then shall the LORD be my God:
Gen 28:22 א: And this stone, which I have set [for] a pillar,
Gen 28:22 ב: shall be God’s house:
Gen 28:22 ג: and of all that thou shalt give me
Gen 28:22 ד: I will surely give the tenth unto thee.
Gen 29:1 א: Then Jacob went on his journey,
Gen 29:1 ב: and came into the land of the people of the east.
Gen 29:2 א: And he looked, and behold a well in the field,
Gen 29:2 ב: and, lo, there [were] three flocks of sheep lying by it;
Gen 29:2 ג: for out of that well they watered the flocks:
Gen 29:2 ד: and a great stone [was] upon the well’s mouth.
Gen 29:3 א: And thither were all the flocks gathered:
Gen 29:3 ב: and they rolled the stone from the well’s mouth,
Gen 29:3 ג: and watered the sheep,
Gen 29:3 ד: and put the stone again upon the well’s mouth in his place.
Gen 29:4 א: And Jacob said unto them,
Gen 29:4 ב: My brethren, whence [be] ye?
Gen 29:4 ג: And they said, Of Haran [are] we.
Gen 29:5 א: And he said unto them,
Gen 29:5 ב: Know ye Laban the son of Nahor?
Gen 29:5 ג: And they said, We know [him].
Gen 29:6 א: And he said unto them, [Is] he well?
Gen 29:6 ב: And they said, [He is] well:
Gen 29:6 ג: and, behold, Rachel his daughter
Gen 29:6 ד: cometh with the sheep.
Gen 29:7 א: And he said, Lo, [it is] yet high day,
Gen 29:7 ב: neither [is it] time that the cattle should be gathered together:
Gen 29:7 ג: water ye the sheep,
Gen 29:7 ד: and go [and] feed [them].
Gen 29:8 א: And they said, We cannot,
Gen 29:8 ב: until all the flocks be gathered together,
Gen 29:8 ג: and [till] they roll the stone from the well’s mouth;
Gen 29:8 ד: then we water the sheep.
Gen 29:9 א: And while he yet spake with them,
Gen 29:9 ב: Rachel came with her father’s sheep:
Gen 29:9 ג: for she kept them.
Gen 29:10 א: And it came to pass, when Jacob saw Rachel
Gen 29:10 ב: the daughter of Laban his mother’s brother,
Gen 29:10 ג: and the sheep of Laban his mother’s brother,
Gen 29:10 ד: that Jacob went near,
Gen 29:10 ה: and rolled the stone from the well’s mouth,
Gen 29:10 ו: and watered the flock of Laban his mother’s brother.
Gen 29:11 א: And Jacob kissed Rachel,
Gen 29:11 ב: and lifted up his voice,
Gen 29:11 ג: and wept.
Gen 29:12 א: And Jacob told Rachel
Gen 29:12 ב: that he [was] her father’s brother,
Gen 29:12 ג: and that he [was] Rebekah’s son:
Gen 29:12 ד: and she ran and told her father.
Gen 29:13 א: And it came to pass, when Laban heard the tidings
Gen 29:13 ב: of Jacob his sister’s son,
Gen 29:13 ג: that he ran to meet him,
Gen 29:13 ד: and embraced him,
Gen 29:13 ה: and kissed him,
Gen 29:13 ו: and brought him to his house.
Gen 29:13 ז: And he told Laban all these things.
Gen 29:14 א: And Laban said to him,
Gen 29:14 ב: Surely thou [art] my bone and my flesh.
Gen 29:14 ג: And he abode with him the space of a month.
Gen 29:15 א: And Laban said unto Jacob,
Gen 29:15 ב: Because thou [art] my brother,
Gen 29:15 ג: shouldest thou therefore serve me for nought?
Gen 29:15 ד: tell me, what [shall] thy wages [be]?
Gen 29:16 א: And Laban had two daughters:
Gen 29:16 ב: the name of the elder [was] Leah,
Gen 29:16 ג: and the name of the younger [was] Rachel.
Gen 29:17 א: Leah [was] tender eyed;
Gen 29:17 ב: but Rachel was beautiful
Gen 29:17 ג: and well favoured.
Gen 29:18 א: And Jacob loved Rachel;
Gen 29:18 ב: and said, I will serve thee seven years for Rachel thy younger daughter.
Gen 29:19 א: And Laban said,
Gen 29:19 ב: [It is] better that I give her to thee,
Gen 29:19 ג: than that I should give her to another man:
Gen 29:19 ד: abide with me.
Gen 29:20 א: And Jacob served seven years for Rachel;
Gen 29:20 ב: and they seemed unto him [but] a few days,
Gen 29:20 ג: for the love he had to her.
Gen 29:21 א: And Jacob said unto Laban,
Gen 29:21 ב: Give [me] my wife,
Gen 29:21 ג: for my days are fulfilled,
Gen 29:21 ד: that I may go in unto her.
Gen 29:22 א: And Laban gathered together all the men of the place,
Gen 29:22 ב: and made a feast.
Gen 29:23 א: And it came to pass in the evening,
Gen 29:23 ב: that he took Leah his daughter,
Gen 29:23 ג: and brought her to him;
Gen 29:23 ד: and he went in unto her.
Gen 29:24 א: And Laban gave [...] Zilpah his maid
Gen 29:24 ב: unto his daughter Leah [...] [for] an handmaid.
Gen 29:25 א: And it came to pass, that in the morning, behold, it [was] Leah:
Gen 29:25 ב: and he said to Laban,
Gen 29:25 ג: What [is] this thou hast done unto me?
Gen 29:25 ד: did not I serve with thee for Rachel?
Gen 29:25 ה: wherefore then hast thou beguiled me?
Gen 29:26 א: And Laban said,
Gen 29:26 ב: It must not be so done in our country,
Gen 29:26 ג: to give the younger before the firstborn.
Gen 29:27 א: Fulfil her week,
Gen 29:27 ב: and we will give thee this also
Gen 29:27 ג: for the service which thou shalt serve with me
Gen 29:27 ד: yet seven other years.
Gen 29:28 א: And Jacob did so,
Gen 29:28 ב: and fulfilled her week:
Gen 29:28 ג: and he gave him Rachel his daughter [...] also.
Gen 29:28 ד: to wife
Gen 29:29 א: And Laban gave to Rachel his daughter
Gen 29:29 ב: Bilhah his handmaid to be her maid.
Gen 29:30 א: And he went in also unto Rachel,
Gen 29:30 ב: and he loved also Rachel more than Leah,
Gen 29:30 ג: and served with him yet seven other years.
Gen 29:31 א: And when the LORD saw that Leah [was] hated,
Gen 29:31 ב: he opened her womb:
Gen 29:31 ג: but Rachel [was] barren.
Gen 29:32 א: And Leah conceived, and bare a son,
Gen 29:32 ב: and she called his name Reuben: for she said,
Gen 29:32 ג: Surely the LORD hath looked upon my affliction;
Gen 29:32 ד: now therefore my husband will love me.
Gen 29:33 א: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said,
Gen 29:33 ב: Because the LORD hath heard that I [was] hated,
Gen 29:33 ג: he hath therefore given me this [son] also:
Gen 29:33 ד: and she called his name Simeon.
Gen 29:34 א: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and said,
Gen 29:34 ב: Now this time will my husband be joined unto me,
Gen 29:34 ג: because I have born him three sons:
Gen 29:34 ד: therefore was his name called Levi.
Gen 29:35 א: And she conceived again, and bare a son: and she said,
Gen 29:35 ב: Now will I praise the LORD:
Gen 29:35 ג: therefore she called his name Judah;

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 29:35 ד: and left bearing.
Gen 30:1 א: And when Rachel saw that she bare Jacob no children,
Gen 30:1 ב: Rachel envied her sister;
Gen 30:1 ג: and said unto Jacob,
Gen 30:1 ד: Give me children,
Gen 30:1 ה: or else I die.
Gen 30:2 א: And Jacob’s anger was kindled against Rachel: and he said,
Gen 30:2 ב: [Am] I in God’s stead,
Gen 30:2 ג: who hath withheld from thee the fruit of the womb?
Gen 30:3 א: And she said, Behold my maid Bilhah,
Gen 30:3 ב: go in unto her; and she shall bear upon my knees,
Gen 30:3 ג: that I may also have children by her.
Gen 30:4 א: And she gave him Bilhah her handmaid to wife:
Gen 30:4 ב: and Jacob went in unto her.
Gen 30:5 א: And Bilhah conceived,
Gen 30:5 ב: and bare Jacob a son.
Gen 30:6 א: And Rachel said, God hath judged me,
Gen 30:6 ב: and hath also heard my voice,
Gen 30:6 ג: and hath given me a son:
Gen 30:6 ד: therefore called she his name Dan.
Gen 30:7 א: And [...] conceived again,
Gen 30:7 ב: Bilhah Rachel’s maid [...] and bare
Gen 30:7 ג: Jacob a second son.
Gen 30:8 א: And Rachel said,
Gen 30:8 ב: With great wrestlings have I wrestled with my sister,
Gen 30:8 ג: and I have prevailed:
Gen 30:8 ד: and she called his name Naphtali.
Gen 30:9 א: When Leah saw that she had left bearing,
Gen 30:9 ב: she took Zilpah her maid,
Gen 30:9 ג: and gave her Jacob to wife.
Gen 30:10 א: And Zilpah Leah’s maid bare
Gen 30:10 ב: Jacob a son.
Gen 30:11 א: And Leah said, A troop cometh:
Gen 30:11 ב: and she called his name Gad.
Gen 30:12 א: And Zilpah Leah’s maid bare
Gen 30:12 ב: Jacob a second son.
Gen 30:13 א: And Leah said, Happy am I,
Gen 30:13 ב: for the daughters will call me blessed:
Gen 30:13 ג: and she called his name Asher.
Gen 30:14 א: And Reuben went in the days of wheat harvest,
Gen 30:14 ב: and found mandrakes in the field,
Gen 30:14 ג: and brought them unto his mother Leah.
Gen 30:14 ד: Then Rachel said to Leah,
Gen 30:14 ה: Give me, I pray thee, of thy son’s mandrakes.
Gen 30:15 א: And she said unto her,
Gen 30:15 ב: [Is it] a small matter that thou hast taken my husband?
Gen 30:15 ג: and wouldest thou take away my son’s mandrakes also?
Gen 30:15 ד: And Rachel said,
Gen 30:15 ה: Therefore he shall lie with thee to night
Gen 30:15 ו: for thy son’s mandrakes.
Gen 30:16 א: And Jacob came out of the field in the evening,
Gen 30:16 ב: and Leah went out to meet him,
Gen 30:16 ג: and said, Thou must come in unto me;
Gen 30:16 ד: for surely I have hired thee with my son’s mandrakes.
Gen 30:16 ה: And he lay with her that night.
Gen 30:17 א: And God hearkened unto Leah,
Gen 30:17 ב: and she conceived, and bare Jacob the fifth son.
Gen 30:18 א: And Leah said,
Gen 30:18 ב: God hath given me my hire,
Gen 30:18 ג: because I have given my maiden to my husband:
Gen 30:18 ד: and she called his name Issachar.
Gen 30:19 א: And Leah conceived again,
Gen 30:19 ב: and bare Jacob the sixth son.
Gen 30:20 א: And Leah said,
Gen 30:20 ב: God hath endued me [with] a good dowry;
Gen 30:20 ג: now will my husband dwell with me,
Gen 30:20 ד: because I have born him six sons:
Gen 30:20 ה: and she called his name Zebulun.
Gen 30:21 א: And afterwards she bare a daughter,
Gen 30:21 ב: and called her name Dinah.
Gen 30:22 א: And God remembered Rachel,
Gen 30:22 ב: and God hearkened to her,
Gen 30:22 ג: and opened her womb.
Gen 30:23 א: And she conceived, and bare a son; and said,
Gen 30:23 ב: God hath taken away my reproach:
Gen 30:24 א: And she called his name Joseph; and said,
Gen 30:24 ב: The LORD shall add to me another son.
Gen 30:25 א: And it came to pass, when Rachel had born Joseph,
Gen 30:25 ב: that Jacob said unto Laban,
Gen 30:25 ג: Send me away,
Gen 30:25 ד: that I may go unto mine own place, and to my country.
Gen 30:26 א: Give [me] my wives and my children,
Gen 30:26 ב: for whom I have served thee,
Gen 30:26 ג: and let me go:
Gen 30:26 ד: for thou knowest my service which I have done thee.
Gen 30:27 א: And Laban said unto him,
Gen 30:27 ב: I pray thee, if I have found favour in thine eyes, [tarry:
Gen 30:27 ג: for] I have learned by experience that the LORD hath blessed me for thy sake.
Gen 30:28 א: And he said, Appoint me thy wages,
Gen 30:28 ב: and I will give [it].
Gen 30:29 א: And he said unto him,
Gen 30:29 ב: Thou knowest how I have served thee,
Gen 30:29 ג: and how thy cattle was with me.
Gen 30:30 א: For [it was] little which thou hadst before I [came],
Gen 30:30 ב: and it is [now] increased unto a multitude;
Gen 30:30 ג: and the LORD hath blessed thee since my coming:
Gen 30:30 ד: and now when shall I provide for mine own house also?
Gen 30:31 א: And he said, What shall I give thee?
Gen 30:31 ב: And Jacob said,
Gen 30:31 ג: Thou shalt not give me any thing:
Gen 30:31 ד: if thou wilt do this thing for me,
Gen 30:31 ה: I will again feed [and] keep thy flock:
Gen 30:32 א: I will pass through all thy flock to day,
Gen 30:32 ב: removing from thence all the speckled and spotted cattle,
Gen 30:32 ג: and all the brown cattle among the sheep,
Gen 30:32 ד: and the spotted and speckled among the goats:
Gen 30:32 ה: and [of such] shall be my hire.
Gen 30:33 א: So shall my righteousness answer for me in time to come,
Gen 30:33 ב: when it shall come for my hire before thy face:
Gen 30:33 ג: every one that [is] not speckled and spotted among the goats,
Gen 30:33 ד: and brown among the sheep,
Gen 30:33 ה: that shall be counted stolen with me.
Gen 30:34 א: And Laban said,
Gen 30:34 ב: Behold, I would it might be according to thy word.
Gen 30:35 א: And he removed that day
Gen 30:35 ב: the he goats that were ringstraked and spotted,
Gen 30:35 ג: and all the she goats that were speckled and spotted,
Gen 30:35 ד: [and] every one that had [some] white in it,
Gen 30:35 ה: and all the brown among the sheep,
Gen 30:35 ו: and gave [them] into the hand of his sons.
Gen 30:36 א: And he set three days’ journey betwixt himself and Jacob:
Gen 30:36 ב: and Jacob fed the rest of Laban’s flocks.
Gen 30:37 א: And Jacob took him rods of green poplar,
Gen 30:37 ב: and of the hazel and chesnut tree;
Gen 30:37 ג: and pilled white strakes in them,
Gen 30:37 ד: and made the white appear which [was] in the rods.
Gen 30:38 א: And he set the rods which he had pilled [...] in the gutters
Gen 30:38 ב: in the watering troughs when the flocks came to drink,
Gen 30:38 ג: before the flocks
Gen 30:38 ד: that they should conceive when they came to drink.
Gen 30:39 א: And the flocks conceived before the rods,
Gen 30:39 ב: and brought forth cattle ringstraked, speckled, and spotted.
Gen 30:40 א: And Jacob did separate the lambs,
Gen 30:40 ב: and set the faces of the flocks toward the ringstraked,
Gen 30:40 ג: and all the brown in the flock of Laban;
Gen 30:40 ד: and he put his own flocks by themselves,
Gen 30:40 ה: and put them not unto Laban’s cattle.
Gen 30:41 א: And it came to pass, whensoever the stronger cattle did conceive,
Gen 30:41 ב: that Jacob laid the rods before the eyes of the cattle in the gutters,
Gen 30:41 ג: that they might conceive among the rods.
Gen 30:42 א: But when the cattle were feeble, he put [them] not in:
Gen 30:42 ב: so the feebler were Laban’s,
Gen 30:42 ג: and the stronger Jacob’s.
Gen 30:43 א: And the man increased exceedingly,
Gen 30:43 ב: and had much cattle,
Gen 30:43 ג: and maidservants, and menservants, and camels, and asses.
Gen 31:1 א: And he heard the words of Laban’s sons, saying,
Gen 31:1 ב: Jacob hath taken away all that [was] our father’s;
Gen 31:1 ג: and of [that] which [was] our father’s
Gen 31:1 ד: hath he gotten all this glory.
Gen 31:2 א: And Jacob beheld the countenance of Laban,
Gen 31:2 ב: and, behold, it [was] not toward him as before.
Gen 31:3 א: And the LORD said unto Jacob,
Gen 31:3 ב: Return unto the land of thy fathers,
Gen 31:3 ג: and to thy kindred;
Gen 31:3 ד: and I will be with thee.
Gen 31:4 א: And Jacob sent
Gen 31:4 ב: and called Rachel and Leah to the field unto his flock,
Gen 31:5 א: And said unto them,
Gen 31:5 ב: I see your father’s countenance,
Gen 31:5 ג: that it [is] not toward me as before;
Gen 31:5 ד: but the God of my father hath been with me.
Gen 31:6 א: And ye know that with all my power
Gen 31:6 ב: I have served your father.
Gen 31:7 א: And your father hath deceived me,
Gen 31:7 ב: and changed my wages ten times;
Gen 31:7 ג: but God suffered him not to hurt me.
Gen 31:8 א: If he said thus, The speckled shall be thy wages;
Gen 31:8 ב: then all the cattle bare speckled:
Gen 31:8 ג: and if he said thus, The ringstraked shall be thy hire;
Gen 31:8 ד: then bare all the cattle ringstraked.
Gen 31:9 א: Thus God hath taken away the cattle of your father,
Gen 31:9 ב: and given [them] to me.
Gen 31:10 א: And it came to pass at the time that the cattle conceived,
Gen 31:10 ב: that I lifted up mine eyes, and saw in a dream, and, behold,
Gen 31:10 ג: the rams which leaped upon the cattle
Gen 31:10 ד: [were] ringstraked, speckled, and grisled.
Gen 31:11 א: And the angel of God spake unto me in a dream,
Gen 31:11 ב: [saying], Jacob:
Gen 31:11 ג: And I said, Here [am] I.
Gen 31:12 א: And he said, Lift up now thine eyes, and see,
Gen 31:12 ב: all the rams which leap upon the cattle
Gen 31:12 ג: [are] ringstraked, speckled, and grisled:
Gen 31:12 ד: for I have seen all that Laban doeth unto thee.
Gen 31:13 א: I [am] the God of Beth–el,
Gen 31:13 ב: where thou anointedst the pillar,
Gen 31:13 ג: [and] where thou vowedst a vow unto me:
Gen 31:13 ד: now arise,
Gen 31:13 ה: get thee out from this land,
Gen 31:13 ו: and return unto the land of thy kindred.
Gen 31:14 א: And Rachel and Leah answered and said unto him,
Gen 31:14 ב: [Is there] yet any portion or inheritance for us in our father’s house?
Gen 31:15 א: Are we not counted of him strangers?
Gen 31:15 ב: for he hath sold us,
Gen 31:15 ג: and hath quite devoured also our money.
Gen 31:16 א: For all the riches which God hath taken from our father,
Gen 31:16 ב: that [is] ours, and our children’s:
Gen 31:16 ג: now then, whatsoever God hath said unto thee,
Gen 31:16 ד: do.
Gen 31:17 א: Then Jacob rose up,
Gen 31:17 ב: and set his sons and his wives
Gen 31:17 ג: upon camels;
Gen 31:18 א: And he carried away all his cattle,
Gen 31:18 ב: and all his goods which he had gotten,
Gen 31:18 ג: the cattle of his getting, which he had gotten in Padan–aram,
Gen 31:18 ד: for to go to Isaac his father
Gen 31:18 ה: in the land of Canaan.
Gen 31:19 א: And Laban went to shear his sheep:
Gen 31:19 ב: and Rachel had stolen the images that [were] her father’s.
Gen 31:20 א: And Jacob stole away unawares to Laban the Syrian,
Gen 31:20 ב: in that he told him not that he fled.
Gen 31:21 א: So he fled with all that he had;
Gen 31:21 ב: and he rose up, and passed over the river,
Gen 31:21 ג: and set his face [toward] the mount Gilead.
Gen 31:22 א: And it was told Laban on the third day
Gen 31:22 ב: that Jacob was fled.
Gen 31:23 א: And he took his brethren with him,
Gen 31:23 ב: and pursued after him seven days’ journey;
Gen 31:23 ג: and they overtook him in the mount Gilead.
Gen 31:24 א: And God came to Laban the Syrian in a dream by night,
Gen 31:24 ב: and said unto him,
Gen 31:24 ג: Take heed that thou
Gen 31:24 ד: speak not to Jacob either good or bad.
Gen 31:25 א: Then Laban overtook Jacob.
Gen 31:25 ב: Now Jacob had pitched his tent in the mount:
Gen 31:25 ג: and Laban with his brethren pitched in the mount of Gilead.
Gen 31:26 א: And Laban said to Jacob,
Gen 31:26 ב: What hast thou done, that thou hast stolen away unawares to me,
Gen 31:26 ג: and carried away my daughters, as captives [taken] with the sword?
Gen 31:27 א: Wherefore didst thou flee away secretly,
Gen 31:27 ב: and steal away from me;
Gen 31:27 ג: and didst not tell me,
Gen 31:27 ד: that I might have sent thee away with mirth,
Gen 31:27 ה: and with songs, with tabret, and with harp?
Gen 31:28 א: And hast not suffered me to kiss my sons and my daughters?
Gen 31:28 ב: thou hast now done foolishly in [so] doing.
Gen 31:29 א: It is in the power of my hand to do you hurt:
Gen 31:29 ב: but the God of your father spake unto me yesternight, saying,
Gen 31:29 ג: Take thou heed that thou speak not to Jacob
Gen 31:29 ד: either good or bad.
Gen 31:30 א: And now, [though] thou wouldest needs be gone,
Gen 31:30 ב: because thou sore longedst after thy father’s house,
Gen 31:30 ג: [yet] wherefore hast thou stolen my gods?
Gen 31:31 א: And Jacob answered and said to Laban,
Gen 31:31 ב: Because I was afraid:
Gen 31:31 ג: for I said,

gist: be not worthy of the least

kjv: Gen 32:10 ב: and of all the truth, which thou hast shewed unto thy servant;

Gen 32:11 ב: from the hand of Esau:
Gen 32:11 ג: for I fear him,
Gen 32:11 ד: lest he will come and smite me,
Gen 32:11 ה: [and] the mother with the children.

Gen 42:16 ב: and let him fetch your brother,
Gen 42:16 ג: and ye shall be kept in prison,
Gen 42:16 ד: that your words may be proved,
Gen 42:16 ה: whether [there be any] truth in you: or else
Gen 42:16 ו: by the life of Pharaoh
Gen 42:16 ז: surely ye [are] spies.
Gen 42:17 א: And he put them all together
Gen 42:17 ב: into ward three days.
Gen 42:18 א: And Joseph said unto them the third day,
Gen 42:18 ב: This do, and live;
Gen 42:18 ג: [for] I fear God:
Gen 42:19 א: If ye [be] true [men],
Gen 42:19 ב: let one of your brethren be bound in the house of your prison:
Gen 42:19 ג: go ye,
Gen 42:19 ד: carry corn for the famine of your houses:
Gen 42:20 א: But bring your youngest brother unto me;
Gen 42:20 ב: so shall your words be verified,
Gen 42:20 ג: and ye shall not die.
Gen 42:20 ד: And they did so.
Gen 42:21 א: And they said one to another,
Gen 42:21 ב: We [are] verily guilty concerning our brother,
Gen 42:21 ג: in that we saw the anguish of his soul,
Gen 42:21 ד: when he besought us,
Gen 42:21 ה: and we would not hear;
Gen 42:21 ו: therefore is this distress come upon us.
Gen 42:22 א: And Reuben answered them, saying,
Gen 42:22 ב: Spake I not unto you, saying,
Gen 42:22 ג: Do not sin against the child;
Gen 42:22 ד: and ye would not hear?
Gen 42:22 ה: therefore, behold, also his blood is required.
Gen 42:23 א: And they knew not that Joseph understood [them];
Gen 42:23 ב: for he spake unto them by an interpreter.
Gen 42:24 א: And he turned himself about from them, and wept;
Gen 42:24 ב: and returned to them again,
Gen 42:24 ג: and communed with them,
Gen 42:24 ד: and took from them Simeon,
Gen 42:24 ה: and bound him before their eyes.
Gen 42:25 א: Then Joseph commanded to fill their sacks with corn,
Gen 42:25 ב: and to restore every man’s money into his sack,
Gen 42:25 ג: and to give them provision for the way:
Gen 42:25 ד: and thus did he unto them.
Gen 42:26 א: And they laded their asses with the corn,
Gen 42:26 ב: and departed thence.
Gen 42:27 א: And as one of them opened his sack
Gen 42:27 ב: to give his ass provender in the inn,
Gen 42:27 ג: he espied his money;
Gen 42:27 ד: for, behold,
Gen 42:27 ה: it [was] in his sack’s mouth.
Gen 42:28 א: And he said unto his brethren,
Gen 42:28 ב: My money is restored;
Gen 42:28 ג: and, lo, [it is] even in my sack:
Gen 42:28 ד: and their heart failed [them],
Gen 42:28 ה: and they were afraid, saying one to another,
Gen 42:28 ו: What [is] this [that] God hath done unto us?
Gen 42:29 א: And they came unto Jacob their father
Gen 42:29 ב: unto the land of Canaan,
Gen 42:29 ג: and told him
Gen 42:29 ד: all that befell unto them;
Gen 42:29 ה: saying,
Gen 42:30 א: The man, [...] spake
Gen 42:30 ב: [who is] the lord of the land,
Gen 42:30 ג: roughly to us,
Gen 42:30 ד: and took us for spies of the country.
Gen 42:31 א: And we said unto him,
Gen 42:31 ב: We [are] true [men];
Gen 42:31 ג: we are no spies:
Gen 42:32 א: We [be] twelve brethren,
Gen 42:32 ב: sons of our father;
Gen 42:32 ג: one [is] not,
Gen 42:32 ד: and the youngest [is] this day with our father
Gen 42:32 ה: in the land of Canaan.
Gen 42:33 א: And the man, [...] said unto us,
Gen 42:33 ב: the lord of the country,
Gen 42:33 ג: Hereby shall I know that ye [are] true [men];
Gen 42:33 ד: leave one of your brethren [here] with me,
Gen 42:33 ה: and [...] [food for] the famine of your households,
Gen 42:33 ו: take [...] and be gone:
Gen 42:34 א: And bring your youngest brother unto me:
Gen 42:34 ב: then shall I know that ye [are] no spies,
Gen 42:34 ג: but [that] ye [are] true [men:
Gen 42:34 ד: so] will I deliver you your brother,
Gen 42:34 ה: and ye shall traffick in the land.
Gen 42:35 א: And it came to pass as they emptied their sacks,
Gen 42:35 ב: that, behold,
Gen 42:35 ג: every man’s bundle of money [was] in his sack:
Gen 42:35 ד: and when [...] saw the bundles of money, they
Gen 42:35 ה: [both] they and their father
Gen 42:35 ו: were afraid.
Gen 42:36 א: And Jacob their father said unto them,
Gen 42:36 ב: Me have ye bereaved [of my children]:
Gen 42:36 ג: Joseph [is] not,
Gen 42:36 ד: and Simeon [is] not,
Gen 42:36 ה: and ye will take Benjamin [away]:
Gen 42:36 ו: all these things are against me.
Gen 42:37 א: And Reuben spake unto his father, saying,
Gen 42:37 ב: Slay my two sons,
Gen 42:37 ג: if I bring him not to thee:
Gen 42:37 ד: deliver him into my hand,
Gen 42:37 ה: and I will bring him to thee again.
Gen 42:38 א: And he said, My son shall not go down with you;
Gen 42:38 ב: for his brother is dead,
Gen 42:38 ג: and he is left alone:
Gen 42:38 ד: if mischief befall him by the way in the which ye go,
Gen 42:38 ה: then shall ye bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to the grave.
Gen 43:1 א: And the famine [was] sore in the land.
Gen 43:2 א: And it came to pass, when they had eaten up
Gen 43:2 ב: the corn which they had brought out of Egypt,
Gen 43:2 ג: their father said unto them,
Gen 43:2 ד: Go again,
Gen 43:2 ה: buy us a little food.
Gen 43:3 א: And Judah spake unto him, saying,

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 43:3 ב: The man did solemnly protest unto us, saying,
Gen 43:3 ג: Ye shall not see my face,
Gen 43:3 ד: except your brother [be] with you.
Gen 43:4 א: If thou wilt send our brother with us,
Gen 43:4 ב: we will go down and buy thee food:
Gen 43:5 א: But if thou wilt not send [him],
Gen 43:5 ב: we will not go down:
Gen 43:5 ג: for the man said unto us,
Gen 43:5 ד: Ye shall not see my face,
Gen 43:5 ה: except your brother [be] with you.
Gen 43:6 א: And Israel said,
Gen 43:6 ב: Wherefore dealt ye [so] ill with me,
Gen 43:6 ג: [as] to tell the man
Gen 43:6 ד: whether ye had yet a brother?
Gen 43:7 א: And they said,
Gen 43:7 ב: The man asked us straitly of our state, and of our kindred, saying,
Gen 43:7 ג: [Is] your father yet alive?
Gen 43:7 ד: have ye [another] brother?
Gen 43:7 ה: and we told him according to the tenor of these words:
Gen 43:7 ו: could we certainly know that he would say,
Gen 43:7 ז: Bring your brother down?
Gen 43:8 א: And Judah said unto Israel his father,

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 43:8 ב: Send the lad with me,
Gen 43:8 ג: and we will arise and go;
Gen 43:8 ד: that we may live, and not die,
Gen 43:8 ה: both we, and thou, [and] also our little ones.
Gen 43:9 א: I will be surety for him;
Gen 43:9 ב: of my hand shalt thou require him:
Gen 43:9 ג: if I bring him not unto thee,
Gen 43:9 ד: and set him before thee,
Gen 43:9 ה: then let me bear the blame for ever:
Gen 43:10 א: For except we had lingered,
Gen 43:10 ב: surely now we had returned this second time.
Gen 43:11 א: And their father Israel said unto them,
Gen 43:11 ב: If [it must be] so now, do this;
Gen 43:11 ג: take of the best fruits in the land in your vessels,
Gen 43:11 ד: and carry down the man a present,
Gen 43:11 ה: a little balm, and a little honey,
Gen 43:11 ו: spices, and myrrh,
Gen 43:11 ז: nuts, and almonds:
Gen 43:12 א: And take double money in your hand;
Gen 43:12 ב: and the money that was brought again in the mouth of your sacks,
Gen 43:12 ג: carry [it] again in your hand;
Gen 43:12 ד: peradventure it [was] an oversight:
Gen 43:13 א: Take also your brother, and
Gen 43:13 ב: arise,
Gen 43:13 ג: go again unto the man:
Gen 43:14 א: And God Almighty
Gen 43:14 ב: give you mercy before the man,
Gen 43:14 ג: that he may send away your other brother,
Gen 43:14 ד: and Benjamin.
Gen 43:14 ה: If I be bereaved [of my children], I am bereaved.
Gen 43:15 א: And the men took that present,
Gen 43:15 ב: and they took double money in their hand,
Gen 43:15 ג: and Benjamin;
Gen 43:15 ד: and rose up, and went down to Egypt,
Gen 43:15 ה: and stood before Joseph.
Gen 43:16 א: And when Joseph saw Benjamin with them,
Gen 43:16 ב: he said to the ruler of his house,
Gen 43:16 ג: Bring [these] men home,
Gen 43:16 ד: and slay, and make ready;
Gen 43:16 ה: for [these] men shall dine with me at noon.
Gen 43:17 א: And the man did as Joseph bade;
Gen 43:17 ב: and the man brought the men
Gen 43:17 ג: into Joseph’s house.
Gen 43:18 א: And the men were afraid,
Gen 43:18 ב: because they were brought into Joseph’s house;
Gen 43:18 ג: and they said,
Gen 43:18 ד: Because of the money
Gen 43:18 ה: that was returned in our sacks at the first time
Gen 43:18 ו: are we brought in;
Gen 43:18 ז: that he may seek occasion against us, and fall upon us,
Gen 43:18 ח: and take us for bondmen,
Gen 43:18 ט: and our asses.
Gen 43:19 א: And they came near to the steward of Joseph’s house,
Gen 43:19 ב: and they communed with him at the door of the house,
Gen 43:20 א: And said, O sir,
Gen 43:20 ב: we came indeed down at the first time to buy food:
Gen 43:21 א: And it came to pass, when we came to the inn,
Gen 43:21 ב: that we opened our sacks,
Gen 43:21 ג: and, behold,
Gen 43:21 ד: [every] man’s money [was] in the mouth of his sack,
Gen 43:21 ה: our money in full weight:
Gen 43:21 ו: and we have brought it again in our hand.
Gen 43:22 א: And other money have we brought down in our hands
Gen 43:22 ב: to buy food:
Gen 43:22 ג: we cannot tell who put our money in our sacks.
Gen 43:23 א: And he said, Peace [be] to you,
Gen 43:23 ב: fear not:
Gen 43:23 ג: your God, and the God of your father,
Gen 43:23 ד: hath given you treasure in your sacks:
Gen 43:23 ה: I had your money.
Gen 43:23 ו: And he brought Simeon out unto them.
Gen 43:24 א: And the man brought the men
Gen 43:24 ב: into Joseph’s house,
Gen 43:24 ג: and gave [them] water,
Gen 43:24 ד: and they washed their feet;
Gen 43:24 ה: and he gave their asses provender.
Gen 43:25 א: And they made ready the present
Gen 43:25 ב: against Joseph came at noon:
Gen 43:25 ג: for they heard that they should eat bread there.
Gen 43:26 א: And when Joseph came home,
Gen 43:26 ב: they brought him the present which [was] in their hand into the house,
Gen 43:26 ג: and bowed themselves to him to the earth.
Gen 43:27 א: And he asked them of [their] welfare, and said,
Gen 43:27 ב: [Is] your father well,
Gen 43:27 ג: the old man of whom ye spake?
Gen 43:27 ד: [Is] he yet alive?
Gen 43:28 א: And they answered, Thy servant our father [is] in good health,
Gen 43:28 ב: he [is] yet alive.
Gen 43:28 ג: And they bowed down their heads, and made obeisance.
Gen 43:29 א: And he lifted up his eyes,
Gen 43:29 ב: and saw his brother Benjamin,
Gen 43:29 ג: his mother’s son, and said,
Gen 43:29 ד: [Is] this your younger brother,
Gen 43:29 ה: of whom ye spake unto me?
Gen 43:29 ו: And he said,
Gen 43:29 ז: God be gracious unto thee, my son.
Gen 43:30 א: And Joseph made haste;
Gen 43:30 ב: for his bowels did yearn upon his brother:
Gen 43:30 ג: and he sought [where] to weep;
Gen 43:30 ד: and he entered into [his] chamber,
Gen 43:30 ה: and wept there.
Gen 43:31 א: And he washed his face,
Gen 43:31 ב: and went out, and refrained himself, and said,
Gen 43:31 ג: Set on bread.
Gen 43:32 א: And they set on for him by himself,
Gen 43:32 ב: and for them by themselves,
Gen 43:32 ג: and for the Egyptians, which did eat with him, by themselves:
Gen 43:32 ד: because the Egyptians might not
Gen 43:32 ה: eat bread with the Hebrews;
Gen 43:32 ו: for that [is] an abomination unto the Egyptians.
Gen 43:33 א: And they sat before him, the firstborn according to his birthright,
Gen 43:33 ב: and the youngest according to his youth:
Gen 43:33 ג: and the men marvelled one at another.
Gen 43:34 א: And he took [and sent] messes unto them from before him:
Gen 43:34 ב: but Benjamin’s mess was five times so much as any of theirs.
Gen 43:34 ג: And they drank, and were merry with him.
Gen 44:1 א: And he commanded the steward of his house, saying,
Gen 44:1 ב: Fill the men’s sacks [with] food,
Gen 44:1 ג: as much as they can carry,
Gen 44:1 ד: and put every man’s money in his sack’s mouth.
Gen 44:2 א: And [...] my cup, the silver cup,
Gen 44:2 ב: put [...] in the sack’s mouth of the youngest,
Gen 44:2 ג: and his corn money.
Gen 44:2 ד: And he did according to the word that Joseph had spoken.
Gen 44:3 א: As soon as the morning was light, the men were sent away,
Gen 44:3 ב: they and their asses.
Gen 44:4 א: [And] when they were gone out of the city,
Gen 44:4 ב: not [yet] far off,
Gen 44:4 ג: [and] [...] Joseph said unto his steward,
Gen 44:4 ד: Up, follow after the men;
Gen 44:4 ה: and when thou dost overtake them, say unto them,
Gen 44:4 ו: Wherefore have ye rewarded evil for good?
Gen 44:5 א: [Is] not this [it] in which my lord drinketh,
Gen 44:5 ב: and whereby indeed he divineth?
Gen 44:5 ג: ye have done evil in so doing.
Gen 44:6 א: And he overtook them, and he spake unto them
Gen 44:6 ב: these same words.
Gen 44:7 א: And they said unto him,
Gen 44:7 ב: Wherefore saith my lord these words?
Gen 44:7 ג: God forbid that thy servants should do according to this thing:
Gen 44:8 א: Behold, the money, which we found in our sacks’ mouths,
Gen 44:8 ב: we brought again unto thee out of the land of Canaan:

Gen 44:8 ד: silver or gold?
Gen 44:9 א: With whomsoever of thy servants it be found, both let him die,
Gen 44:9 ב: and we also will be my lord’s bondmen.
Gen 44:10 א: And he said,
Gen 44:10 ב: Now also [let] it [be] according unto your words:
Gen 44:10 ג: with whom it is found
Gen 44:10 ד: he [...] shall be my servant;
Gen 44:10 ה: and ye shall be blameless.
Gen 44:11 א: Then they speedily
Gen 44:11 ב: took down every man his sack to the ground,
Gen 44:11 ג: and opened every man his sack.
Gen 44:12 א: And he searched,
Gen 44:12 ב: [and] began at the eldest,
Gen 44:12 ג: and left at the youngest:

Gen 44:13 א: Then they rent their clothes,
Gen 44:13 ב: and laded every man his ass,
Gen 44:13 ג: and returned to the city.
Gen 44:14 א: And Judah and his brethren came to Joseph’s house;

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 44:14 ב: for he [was] yet there:
Gen 44:14 ג: and they fell before him on the ground.
Gen 44:15 א: And Joseph said unto them,
Gen 44:15 ב: What deed [is] this that ye have done?
Gen 44:15 ג: wot ye not that [...] can certainly divine?
Gen 44:15 ד: such a man as I
Gen 44:16 א: And Judah said,

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 44:16 ב: What shall we say unto my lord?
Gen 44:16 ג: what shall we speak?
Gen 44:16 ד: or how shall we clear ourselves?
Gen 44:16 ה: God hath found out the iniquity of thy servants:
Gen 44:16 ו: behold, we [are] my lord’s servants,
Gen 44:16 ז: both we,
Gen 44:16 ח: and [he] also with whom the cup is found.
Gen 44:17 א: And he said, God forbid that I should do so:
Gen 44:17 ב: [but] the man in whose hand the cup is found,
Gen 44:17 ג: he shall be my servant;
Gen 44:17 ד: and as for you, get you up in peace unto your father.
Gen 44:18 א: Then Judah came near unto him, and said,

meaning: Judah (Yah causes to be thrown hands)

kjv: Gen 44:18 ב: Oh my lord,
Gen 44:18 ג: let thy servant, I pray thee, speak a word in my lord’s ears,
Gen 44:18 ד: and let not thine anger burn against thy servant:
Gen 44:18 ה: for thou [art] even as Pharaoh.
Gen 44:19 א: My lord asked his servants, saying,
Gen 44:19 ב: Have ye a father, or a brother?
Gen 44:20 א: And we said unto my lord,
Gen 44:20 ב: We have a father, an old man,
Gen 44:20 ג: and a child of his old age, a little one;
Gen 44:20 ד: and his brother is dead,
Gen 44:20 ה: and he alone is left of his mother,
Gen 44:20 ו: and his father loveth him.
Gen 44:21 א: And thou saidst unto thy servants,
Gen 44:21 ב: Bring him down unto me,
Gen 44:21 ג: that I may set mine eyes upon him.
Gen 44:22 א: And we said unto my lord,
Gen 44:22 ב: The lad cannot leave his father:
Gen 44:22 ג: for [if] he should leave his father, [his father] would die.
Gen 44:23 א: And thou saidst unto thy servants,
Gen 44:23 ב: Except your youngest brother come down with you,
Gen 44:23 ג: ye shall see my face no more.
Gen 44:24 א: And it came to pass when we came up unto thy servant my father,
Gen 44:24 ב: we told him the words of my lord.
Gen 44:25 א: And our father said, Go again,
Gen 44:25 ב: [and] buy us a little food.
Gen 44:26 א: And we said,
Gen 44:26 ב: We cannot go down:
Gen 44:26 ג: if our youngest brother be with us,
Gen 44:26 ד: then will we go down:
Gen 44:26 ה: for we may not see the man’s face,
Gen 44:26 ו: except our youngest brother [be] with us.
Gen 44:27 א: And thy servant my father said unto us,
Gen 44:27 ב: Ye know that my wife bare me two [sons]:
Gen 44:28 א: And the one went out from me,
Gen 44:28 ב: and I said, Surely he is torn in pieces;
Gen 44:28 ג: and I saw him not since:
Gen 44:29 א: And if ye take this also from me,
Gen 44:29 ב: and mischief befall him,
Gen 44:29 ג: ye shall bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to the grave.
Gen 44:30 א: Now therefore when I come to thy servant my father,
Gen 44:30 ב: and the lad [be] not with us;
Gen 44:30 ג: seeing that his life is bound up in the lad’s life;
Gen 44:31 א: It shall come to pass, when he seeth that the lad [is] not [with us], that he will die:
Gen 44:31 ב: and thy servants shall bring down
Gen 44:31 ג: the gray hairs of thy servant our father
Gen 44:31 ד: with sorrow to the grave.
Gen 44:32 א: For thy servant became surety for the lad
Gen 44:32 ב: unto my father, saying,
Gen 44:32 ג: If I bring him not unto thee,
Gen 44:32 ד: then I shall bear the blame to my father for ever.
Gen 44:33 א: Now therefore, I pray thee, let thy servant abide
Gen 44:33 ב: instead of the lad
Gen 44:33 ג: a bondman to my lord;
Gen 44:33 ד: and let the lad go up with his brethren.
Gen 44:34 א: For how shall I go up to my father,
Gen 44:34 ב: and the lad [be] not with me?
Gen 44:34 ג: lest peradventure I see the evil that shall come on my father.

Gen 45:1 ב: before all them that stood by him;
Gen 45:1 ג: and he cried,
Gen 45:1 ד: Cause every man to go out from me.

Gen 45:1 ו: while Joseph made himself known unto his brethren.

Gen 45:2 ג: and the house of Pharaoh
Gen 45:3 א: And Joseph said unto his brethren,
Gen 45:3 ב: I [am] Joseph;
Gen 45:3 ג: doth my father yet live?

Gen 45:4 ד: I [am] Joseph

Gen 45:5 ב: nor angry with yourselves,
Gen 45:5 ג: that ye sold me hither:

Gen 45:7 א: And God sent me before you
Gen 45:7 ב: to preserve you a posterity in the earth,
Gen 45:7 ג: and to save your lives by a great deliverance.
Gen 45:8 א: So now [it was] not you [that] sent me hither,
Gen 45:8 ב: but God:

Gen 45:8 ד: and lord of all his house,
Gen 45:8 ה: and a ruler throughout all the land of Egypt.
Gen 45:9 א: Haste ye, and go up to my father,
Gen 45:9 ב: and say unto him,
Gen 45:9 ג: Thus saith thy son Joseph,
Gen 45:9 ד: God hath made me lord of all Egypt:
Gen 45:9 ה: come down unto me,
Gen 45:9 ו: tarry not:

Gen 45:10 ב: and thou shalt be near unto me,
Gen 45:10 ג: thou, and thy children, and thy children’s children,
Gen 45:10 ד: and thy flocks, and thy herds, and all that thou hast:
Gen 45:11 א: And there will I nourish thee;
Gen 45:11 ב: for yet [there are] five years of famine;
Gen 45:11 ג: lest thou, [...] come to poverty.

Gen 45:11 ה: and all that thou hast,
Gen 45:12 א: And, behold, your eyes see,

Gen 45:12 ג: that [it is] my mouth that speaketh unto you.
Gen 45:13 א: And ye shall tell my father of all my glory in Egypt,
Gen 45:13 ב: and of all that ye have seen;
Gen 45:13 ג: and ye shall haste
Gen 45:13 ד: and bring down my father hither.
Gen 45:14 א: And he fell upon his brother Benjamin’s neck, and wept;
Gen 45:14 ב: and Benjamin wept upon his neck.
Gen 45:15 א: Moreover he kissed all his brethren,
Gen 45:15 ב: and wept upon them:
Gen 45:15 ג: and after that his brethren talked with him.
Gen 45:16 א: And the fame thereof was heard in Pharaoh’s house, saying,
Gen 45:16 ב: Joseph’s brethren are come:
Gen 45:16 ג: and it pleased Pharaoh well, and his servants.
Gen 45:17 א: And Pharaoh said unto Joseph,
Gen 45:17 ב: Say unto thy brethren,
Gen 45:17 ג: This do ye;
Gen 45:17 ד: lade your beasts, and go,
Gen 45:17 ה: get you unto the land of Canaan;
Gen 45:18 א: And take your father and your households,
Gen 45:18 ב: and come unto me:
Gen 45:18 ג: and I will give you the good of the land of Egypt,
Gen 45:18 ד: and ye shall eat the fat of the land.
Gen 45:19 א: Now thou art commanded, this do ye;
Gen 45:19 ב: take you [...] out of the land of Egypt
Gen 45:19 ג: wagons [...] for your little ones, and for your wives,
Gen 45:19 ד: and bring your father,
Gen 45:19 ה: and come.
Gen 45:20 א: Also regard not your stuff;
Gen 45:20 ב: for the good of all the land of Egypt [is] yours.
Gen 45:21 א: And the children of Israel did so:
Gen 45:21 ב: and Joseph gave them
Gen 45:21 ג: wagons, according to the commandment of Pharaoh,
Gen 45:21 ד: and gave them provision for the way.
Gen 45:22 א: To all of them he gave each man changes of raiment;
Gen 45:22 ב: but to Benjamin he gave three hundred [pieces] of silver,
Gen 45:22 ג: and five changes of raiment.
Gen 45:23 א: And to his father he sent after this [manner];
Gen 45:23 ב: ten asses laden with the good things of Egypt,
Gen 45:23 ג: and ten she asses laden with corn
Gen 45:23 ד: and bread and meat for his father by the way.
Gen 45:24 א: So he sent his brethren away, and they departed:
Gen 45:24 ב: and he said unto them,
Gen 45:24 ג: See that ye fall not out by the way.
Gen 45:25 א: And they went up out of Egypt,
Gen 45:25 ב: and came into the land of Canaan
Gen 45:25 ג: unto Jacob their father,
Gen 45:26 א: And told him, saying,
Gen 45:26 ב: Joseph [is] yet alive,
Gen 45:26 ג: and he [is] governor over all the land of Egypt.
Gen 45:26 ד: And Jacob’s heart fainted,
Gen 45:26 ה: for he believed them not.
Gen 45:27 א: And they told him

Gen 49:28 ג: and blessed them;
Gen 49:28 ד: every one according to his blessing
Gen 49:28 ה: he blessed them.
Gen 49:29 א: And he charged them, and said unto them,
Gen 49:29 ב: I am to be gathered unto my people:
Gen 49:29 ג: bury me with my fathers
Gen 49:29 ד: in the cave that [is] in the field of Ephron the Hittite,
Gen 49:30 א: In the cave that [is] in the field of Machpelah,
Gen 49:30 ב: which [is] before Mamre,
Gen 49:30 ג: in the land of Canaan,
Gen 49:30 ד: which Abraham bought
Gen 49:30 ה: with the field of Ephron the Hittite
Gen 49:30 ו: for a possession of a buryingplace.
Gen 49:31 א: There they buried Abraham
Gen 49:31 ב: and Sarah his wife;
Gen 49:31 ג: there they buried Isaac
Gen 49:31 ד: and Rebekah his wife;
Gen 49:31 ה: and there I buried Leah.
Gen 49:32 א: The purchase of the field
Gen 49:32 ב: and of the cave that [is] therein [was]
Gen 49:32 ג: from the children of Heth.
Gen 49:33 א: And when Jacob had made an end of commanding his sons,
Gen 49:33 ב: he gathered up his feet into the bed,
Gen 49:33 ג: and yielded up the ghost,
Gen 49:33 ד: and was gathered unto his people.
Gen 50:1 א: And Joseph fell upon his father’s face,
Gen 50:1 ב: and wept upon him,
Gen 50:1 ג: and kissed him.
Gen 50:2 א: And Joseph commanded his servants
Gen 50:2 ב: the physicians
Gen 50:2 ג: to embalm his father:
Gen 50:2 ד: and the physicians embalmed Israel.
Gen 50:3 א: And forty days were fulfilled for him;
Gen 50:3 ב: for so are fulfilled the days of those which are embalmed:
Gen 50:3 ג: and the Egyptians mourned for him threescore and ten days.
Gen 50:4 א: And when the days of his mourning were past,
Gen 50:4 ב: Joseph spake unto the house of Pharaoh, saying,
Gen 50:4 ג: If now I have found grace in your eyes,
Gen 50:4 ד: speak, I pray you, in the ears of Pharaoh, saying,
Gen 50:5 א: My father made me swear, saying,
Gen 50:5 ב: Lo, I die:
Gen 50:5 ג: in my grave which I have digged for me in the land of Canaan,
Gen 50:5 ד: there shalt thou bury me.
Gen 50:5 ה: Now therefore let me go up, I pray thee,
Gen 50:5 ו: and bury my father,
Gen 50:5 ז: and I will come again.
Gen 50:6 א: And Pharaoh said, Go up,
Gen 50:6 ב: and bury thy father,
Gen 50:6 ג: according as he made thee swear.
Gen 50:7 א: And Joseph went up to bury his father:
Gen 50:7 ב: and with him went up all the servants of Pharaoh,
Gen 50:7 ג: the elders of his house,
Gen 50:7 ד: and all the elders of the land of Egypt,
Gen 50:8 א: And all the house of Joseph, and his brethren,
Gen 50:8 ב: and his father’s house:
Gen 50:8 ג: only their little ones, and their flocks, and their herds,
Gen 50:8 ד: they left in the land of Goshen.
Gen 50:9 א: And there went up with him
Gen 50:9 ב: both chariots and horsemen:
Gen 50:9 ג: and it was a very great company.
Gen 50:10 א: And they came to the threshingfloor of Atad,
Gen 50:10 ב: which [is] beyond Jordan,
Gen 50:10 ג: and there they mourned with a great and very sore lamentation:
Gen 50:10 ד: and he made a mourning for his father seven days.
Gen 50:11 א: And when the inhabitants of the land, the Canaanites, saw
Gen 50:11 ב: the mourning in the floor of Atad,
Gen 50:11 ג: they said,
Gen 50:11 ד: This [is] a grievous mourning to the Egyptians:
Gen 50:11 ה: wherefore the name of it was called Abel–mizraim,
Gen 50:11 ו: which [is] beyond Jordan.
Gen 50:12 א: And his sons did unto him according
Gen 50:12 ב: as he commanded them:
Gen 50:13 א: For his sons carried him into the land of Canaan,
Gen 50:13 ב: and buried him in the cave of the field of Machpelah,
Gen 50:13 ג: which Abraham bought with the field for a possession of a buryingplace
Gen 50:13 ד: of Ephron the Hittite,
Gen 50:13 ה: before Mamre.
Gen 50:14 א: And Joseph returned into Egypt,
Gen 50:14 ב: he, and his brethren,
Gen 50:14 ג: and all that went up with him to bury his father,
Gen 50:14 ד: after he had buried his father.
Gen 50:15 א: And when Joseph’s brethren saw that their father was dead,
Gen 50:15 ב: they said, Joseph will peradventure hate us,
Gen 50:15 ג: and will certainly requite us
Gen 50:15 ד: all the evil which we did unto him.
Gen 50:16 א: And they sent a messenger unto Joseph, saying,
Gen 50:16 ב: Thy father did command before he died, saying,
Gen 50:17 א: So shall ye say unto Joseph,
Gen 50:17 ב: Forgive, I pray thee now, the trespass of thy brethren,
Gen 50:17 ג: and their sin;
Gen 50:17 ד: for they did unto thee evil:
Gen 50:17 ה: and now, we pray thee, forgive
Gen 50:17 ו: the trespass of the servants of the God of thy father.
Gen 50:17 ז: And Joseph wept when they spake unto him.
Gen 50:18 א: And his brethren also went
Gen 50:18 ב: and fell down before his face;
Gen 50:18 ג: and they said, Behold, we [be] thy servants.
Gen 50:19 א: And Joseph said unto them,
Gen 50:19 ב: Fear not:
Gen 50:19 ג: for [am] I in the place of God?
Gen 50:20 א: But as for you, ye thought evil against me;
Gen 50:20 ב: [but] God meant it unto good,
Gen 50:20 ג: to bring to pass, as [it is] this day,
Gen 50:20 ד: to save much people alive.
Gen 50:21 א: Now therefore fear ye not:
Gen 50:21 ב: I will nourish you, and your little ones.
Gen 50:21 ג: And he comforted them,
Gen 50:21 ד: and spake kindly unto them.
Gen 50:22 א: And Joseph dwelt in Egypt,
Gen 50:22 ב: he, and his father’s house:
Gen 50:22 ג: and Joseph lived an hundred and ten years.
Gen 50:23 א: And Joseph saw Ephraim’s children of the third [generation]:
Gen 50:23 ב: the children also of Machir
Gen 50:23 ג: son of Manasseh
Gen 50:23 ד: the [...] were brought up upon Joseph’s knees.
Gen 50:24 א: And Joseph said unto his brethren,
Gen 50:24 ב: I die:
Gen 50:24 ג: and God will surely visit you,
Gen 50:24 ד: and bring you out of this land
Gen 50:24 ה: unto the land which he sware
Gen 50:24 ו: to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.
Gen 50:25 א: And Joseph took an oath of the children of Israel, saying,
Gen 50:25 ב: God will surely visit you,
Gen 50:25 ג: and ye shall carry up my bones from hence.
Gen 50:26 א: So Joseph died, [being] an hundred and ten years old:
Gen 50:26 ב: and they embalmed him,
Gen 50:26 ג: and he was put in a coffin in Egypt.
